verses.verse: Happy are they who have not walked in the counsel of the wicked, *
verses.halfverse: nor lingered in the way of sinners, nor sat in the seats of the scornful!

verses.verse: Their delight is in the law of the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and they meditate on his law day and night.

verses.verse: They are like trees planted by streams of water, bearing fruit in due season, with leaves that do not wither; *
verses.halfverse: everything they do shall prosper.

verses.verse: It is not so with the wicked; *
verses.halfverse: they are like chaff which the wind blows away.

verses.verse: Therefore the wicked shall not stand upright when judgment comes, *
verses.halfverse: nor the sinner in the council of the righteous.

verses.verse: For the LORD knows the way of the righteous, *
verses.halfverse: but the way of the wicked is doomed.

verses.verse: Why are the nations in an uproar? *
verses.halfverse: Why do the peoples mutter empty threats?

verses.verse: Why do the kings of the earth rise up in revolt, and the princes plot together, *
verses.halfverse: against the LORD and against his Anointed?

verses.verse: "Let us break their yoke," they say; *
verses.halfverse: "let us cast off their bonds from us."

verses.verse: He whose throne is in heaven is laughing; *
verses.halfverse: the Lord has them in derision.

verses.verse: Then he speaks to them in his wrath, *
verses.halfverse: and his rage fills them with terror.

verses.verse: "I myself have set my king *
verses.halfverse: upon my holy hill of Zion."

verses.verse: Let me announce the decree of the LORD: *
verses.halfverse: he said to me, "You are my Son; this day have I begotten you.

verses.verse: Ask of me, and I will give you the nations for your inheritance *
verses.halfverse: and the ends of the earth for your possession.

verses.verse: You shall crush them with an iron rod *
verses.halfverse: and shatter them like a piece of pottery."

verses.verse: And now, you kings, be wise; *
verses.halfverse: be warned, you rulers of the earth.

verses.verse: Submit to the LORD with fear, *
verses.halfverse: and with trembling bow before him;

verses.verse: Lest he be angry and you perish; *
verses.halfverse: for his wrath is quickly kindled.

verses.verse: Happy are they all *
verses.halfverse: who take refuge in him!

verses.verse: LORD, how many adversaries I have! *
verses.halfverse: how many there are who rise up against me!

verses.verse: How many there are who say of me, *
verses.halfverse: "There is no help for him in his God."

verses.verse: But you, O LORD, are a shield about me; *
verses.halfverse: you are my glory, the one who lifts up my head.

verses.verse: I call aloud upon the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and he answers me from his holy hill;

verses.verse: I lie down and go to sleep; *
verses.halfverse: I wake again, because the LORD sustains me.

verses.verse: I do not fear the multitudes of people *
verses.halfverse: who set themselves against me all around.

verses.verse: Rise up, O LORD; set me free, O my God; *
verses.halfverse: surely, you will strike all my enemies across the face, you will break the teeth of the wicked.

verses.verse: Deliverance belongs to the LORD. *
verses.halfverse: Your blessing be upon your people!

verses.verse: Answer me when I call, O God, defender of my cause; *
verses.halfverse: you set me free when I am hard-pressed; have mercy on me and hear my prayer.

verses.verse: "You mortals, how long will you dishonor my glory; *
verses.halfverse: how long will you worship dumb idols and run after false gods?"

verses.verse: Know that the LORD does wonders for the faithful; *
verses.halfverse: when I call upon the LORD, he will hear me.

verses.verse: Tremble, then, and do not sin; *
verses.halfverse: speak to your heart in silence upon your bed.

verses.verse: Offer the appointed sacrifices *
verses.halfverse: and put your trust in the LORD.

verses.verse: Many are saying, "Oh, that we might see better times!" *
verses.halfverse: Lift up the light of your countenance upon us, O LORD.

verses.verse: You have put gladness in my heart, *
verses.halfverse: more than when grain and wine and oil increase.

verses.verse: I lie down in peace; at once I fall asleep; *
verses.halfverse: for only you, LORD, make me dwell in safety.

verses.verse: Give ear to my words, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: consider my meditation.

verses.verse: Hearken to my cry for help, my King and my God, *
verses.halfverse: for I make my prayer to you.

verses.verse: In the morning, LORD, you hear my voice; *
verses.halfverse: early in the morning I make my appeal and watch for you.

verses.verse: For you are not a God who takes pleasure in wickedness, *
verses.halfverse: and evil cannot dwell with you.

verses.verse: Braggarts cannot stand in your sight; *
verses.halfverse: you hate all those who work wickedness.

verses.verse: You destroy those who speak lies; *
verses.halfverse: the bloodthirsty and deceitful, O LORD, you abhor.

verses.verse: But as for me, through the greatness of your mercy I will go into your house; *
verses.halfverse: I will bow down toward your holy temple in awe of you.

verses.verse: Lead me, O LORD, in your righteousness, because of those who lie in wait for me; *
verses.halfverse: make your way straight before me.

verses.verse: For there is no truth in their mouth; *
verses.halfverse: there is destruction in their heart;

verses.verse: Their throat is an open grave; *
verses.halfverse: they flatter with their tongue.

verses.verse: Declare them guilty, O God; *
verses.halfverse: let them fall, because of their schemes.

verses.verse: Because of their many transgressions cast them out, *
verses.halfverse: for they have rebelled against you.

verses.verse: But all who take refuge in you will be glad; *
verses.halfverse: they will sing out their joy for ever.

verses.verse: You will shelter them, *
verses.halfverse: so that those who love your Name may exult in you.

verses.verse: For you, O LORD, will bless the righteous; *
verses.halfverse: you will defend them with your favor as with a shield.

verses.verse: LORD, do not rebuke me in your anger; *
verses.halfverse: do not punish me in your wrath.

verses.verse: Have pity on me, LORD, for I am weak; *
verses.halfverse: heal me, LORD, for my bones are racked.

verses.verse: My spirit shakes with terror; *
verses.halfverse: how long, O LORD, how long?

verses.verse: Turn, O LORD, and deliver me; *
verses.halfverse: save me for your mercy's sake.

verses.verse: For in death no one remembers you; *
verses.halfverse: and who will give you thanks in the grave?

verses.verse: I grow weary because of my groaning; *
verses.halfverse: every night I drench my bed and flood my couch with tears.

verses.verse: My eyes are wasted with grief *
verses.halfverse: and worn away because of all my enemies.

verses.verse: Depart from me, all evildoers, *
verses.halfverse: for the LORD has heard the sound of my weeping.

verses.verse: The LORD has heard my supplication; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD accepts my prayer.

verses.verse: All my enemies shall be confounded and quake with fear; *
verses.halfverse: they shall turn back and suddenly be put to shame.

verses.verse: O LORD my God, I take refuge in you; *
verses.halfverse: save and deliver me from all who pursue me;

verses.verse: Lest like a lion they tear me in pieces *
verses.halfverse: and snatch me away with none to deliver me.

verses.verse: O LORD my God, if I have done these things: *
verses.halfverse: if there is any wickedness in my hands,

verses.verse: If I have repaid my friend with evil, *
verses.halfverse: or plundered him who without cause is my enemy;

verses.verse: Then let my enemy pursue and overtake me, *
verses.halfverse: trample my life into the ground, and lay my honor in the dust.

verses.verse: Stand up, O LORD, in your wrath; *
verses.halfverse: rise up against the fury of my enemies.

verses.verse: Awake, O my God, decree justice; *
verses.halfverse: let the assembly of the peoples gather round you.

verses.verse: Be seated on your lofty throne, O Most High; *
verses.halfverse: O LORD, judge the nations.

verses.verse: Give judgment for me according to my righteousness, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and according to my innocence, O Most High.

verses.verse: Let the malice of the wicked come to an end, but establish the righteous; *
verses.halfverse: for you test the mind and heart, O righteous God.

verses.verse: God is my shield and defense; *
verses.halfverse: he is the savior of the true in heart.

verses.verse: God is a righteous judge; *
verses.halfverse: God sits in judgment every day.

verses.verse: If they will not repent, God will whet his sword; *
verses.halfverse: he will bend his bow and make it ready.

verses.verse: He has prepared his weapons of death; *
verses.halfverse: he makes his arrows shafts of fire.

verses.verse: Look at those who are in labor with wickedness, *
verses.halfverse: who conceive evil, and give birth to a lie.

verses.verse: They dig a pit and make it deep *
verses.halfverse: and fall into the hole that they have made.

verses.verse: Their malice turns back upon their own head; *
verses.halfverse: their violence falls on their own scalp.

verses.verse: I will bear witness that the LORD is righteous; *
verses.halfverse: I will praise the Name of the LORD Most High.

verses.verse: O LORD our Governor, *
verses.halfverse: how exalted is your Name in all the world!

verses.verse: Out of the mouths of infants and children *
verses.halfverse: your majesty is praised above the heavens.

verses.verse: You have set up a stronghold against your adversaries, *
verses.halfverse: to quell the enemy and the avenger.

verses.verse: When I consider your heavens, the work of your fingers, *
verses.halfverse: the moon and the stars you have set in their courses,

verses.verse: What is man that you should be mindful of him? *
verses.halfverse: the son of man that you should seek him out?

verses.verse: You have made him but little lower than the angels; *
verses.halfverse: you adorn him with glory and honor;

verses.verse: You give him mastery over the works of your hands; *
verses.halfverse: you put all things under his feet:

verses.verse: All sheep and oxen, *
verses.halfverse: even the wild beasts of the field,

verses.verse: The birds of the air, the fish of the sea, *
verses.halfverse: and whatsoever walks in the paths of the sea.

verses.verse: O LORD our Governor, *
verses.halfverse: how exalted is your Name in all the world!

verses.verse: I will give thanks to you, O LORD, with my whole heart; *
verses.halfverse: I will tell of all your marvelous works.

verses.verse: I will be glad and rejoice in you; *
verses.halfverse: I will sing to your Name, O Most High.

verses.verse: When my enemies are driven back, *
verses.halfverse: they will stumble and perish at your presence.

verses.verse: For you have maintained my right and my cause; *
verses.halfverse: you sit upon your throne judging right.

verses.verse: You have rebuked the ungodly and destroyed the wicked; *
verses.halfverse: you have blotted out their name for ever and ever.

verses.verse: As for the enemy, they are finished, in perpetual ruin, *
verses.halfverse: their cities plowed under, the memory of them perished;

verses.verse: But the LORD is enthroned for ever; *
verses.halfverse: he has set up his throne for judgment.

verses.verse: It is he who rules the world with righteousness; *
verses.halfverse: he judges the peoples with equity.

verses.verse: The LORD will be a refuge for the oppressed, *
verses.halfverse: a refuge in time of trouble.

verses.verse: Those who know your Name will put their trust in you, *
verses.halfverse: for you never forsake those who seek you, O LORD.

verses.verse: Sing praise to the LORD who dwells in Zion; *
verses.halfverse: proclaim to the peoples the things he has done.

verses.verse: The Avenger of blood will remember them; *
verses.halfverse: he will not forget the cry of the afflicted.

verses.verse: Have pity on me, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: see the misery I suffer from those who hate me, O you who lift me up from the gate of death;

verses.verse: So that I may tell of all your praises and rejoice in your salvation *
verses.halfverse: in the gates of the city of Zion.

verses.verse: The ungodly have fallen into the pit they dug, *
verses.halfverse: and in the snare they set is their own foot caught.

verses.verse: The LORD is known by his acts of justice; *
verses.halfverse: the wicked are trapped in the works of their own hands.

verses.verse: The wicked shall be given over to the grave, *
verses.halfverse: and also all the people that forget God.

verses.verse: For the needy shall not always be forgotten, *
verses.halfverse: and the hope of the poor shall not perish for ever.

verses.verse: Rise up, O LORD, let not the ungodly have the upper hand; *
verses.halfverse: let them be judged before you.

verses.verse: Put fear upon them, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: let the ungodly know they are but mortal.

verses.verse: Why do you stand so far off, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and hide yourself in time of trouble?

verses.verse: The wicked arrogantly persecute the poor, *
verses.halfverse: but they are trapped in the schemes they have devised.

verses.verse: The wicked boast of their heart's desire; *
verses.halfverse: the covetous curse and revile the LORD.

verses.verse: The wicked are so proud that they care not for God; *
verses.halfverse: their only thought is, "God does not matter."

verses.verse: Their ways are devious at all times; your judgments are far above out of their sight; *
verses.halfverse: they defy all their enemies.

verses.verse: They say in their heart, "I shall not be shaken; *
verses.halfverse: no harm shall happen to me ever."

verses.verse: Their mouth is full of cursing, deceit, and oppression; *
verses.halfverse: under their tongue are mischief and wrong.

verses.verse: They lurk in ambush in public squares and in secret places they murder the innocent; *
verses.halfverse: they spy out the helpless.

verses.verse: They lie in wait, like a lion in a covert; they lie in wait to seize upon the lowly; *
verses.halfverse: they seize the lowly and drag them away in their net.

verses.verse: The innocent are broken and humbled before them; *
verses.halfverse: the helpless fall before their power.

verses.verse: They say in their heart, "God has forgotten; *
verses.halfverse: he hides his face; he will never notice."

verses.verse: Rise up, O LORD; lift up your hand, O God; *
verses.halfverse: do not forget the afflicted.

verses.verse: Why should the wicked revile God? *
verses.halfverse: why should they say in their heart, "You do not care"?

verses.verse: Surely, you behold trouble and misery; *
verses.halfverse: you see it and take it into your own hand.

verses.verse: The helpless commit themselves to you, *
verses.halfverse: for you are the helper of orphans.

verses.verse: Break the power of the wicked and evil; *
verses.halfverse: search out their wickedness until you find none.

verses.verse: The LORD is King for ever and ever; *
verses.halfverse: the ungodly shall perish from his land.

verses.verse: The LORD will hear the desire of the humble; *
verses.halfverse: you will strengthen their heart and your ears shall hear;

verses.verse: To give justice to the orphan and oppressed, *
verses.halfverse: so that mere mortals may strike terror no more.

verses.verse: In the LORD have I taken refuge; *
verses.halfverse: how then can you say to me, "Fly away like a bird to the hilltop;

verses.verse: For see how the wicked bend the bow and fit their arrows to the string, *
verses.halfverse: to shoot from ambush at the true of heart.

verses.verse: When the foundations are being destroyed, *
verses.halfverse: what can the righteous do?"

verses.verse: The LORD is in his holy temple; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD'S throne is in heaven.

verses.verse: His eyes behold the inhabited world; *
verses.halfverse: his piercing eye weighs our worth.

verses.verse: The LORD weighs the righteous as well as the wicked, *
verses.halfverse: but those who delight in violence he abhors.

verses.verse: Upon the wicked he shall rain coals of fire and burning sulphur; *
verses.halfverse: a scorching wind shall be their lot.

verses.verse: For the LORD is righteous; he delights in righteous deeds; *
verses.halfverse: and the just shall see his face.

verses.verse: Help me, LORD, for there is no godly one left; *
verses.halfverse: the faithful have vanished from among us.

verses.verse: Everyone speaks falsely with his neighbor; *
verses.halfverse: with a smooth tongue they speak from a double heart.

verses.verse: Oh, that the LORD would cut off all smooth tongues, *
verses.halfverse: and close the lips that utter proud boasts!

verses.verse: Those who say, "With our tongue will we prevail; *
verses.halfverse: our lips are our own; who is lord over us?"

verses.verse: "Because the needy are oppressed, and the poor cry out in misery, *
verses.halfverse: I will rise up," says the LORD, "and give them the help they long for."

verses.verse: The words of the LORD are pure words, *
verses.halfverse: like silver refined from ore and purified seven times in the fire.

verses.verse: O LORD, watch over us *
verses.halfverse: and save us from this generation for ever.

verses.verse: The wicked prowl on every side, *
verses.halfverse: and that which is worthless is highly prized by everyone.

verses.verse: How long, O LORD? will you forget me for ever? *
verses.halfverse: how long will you hide your face from me?

verses.verse: How long shall I have perplexity in my mind, and grief in my heart, day after day? *
verses.halfverse: how long shall my enemy triumph over me?

verses.verse: Look upon me and answer me, O LORD my God; *
verses.halfverse: give light to my eyes, lest I sleep in death;

verses.verse: Lest my enemy say, "I have prevailed over him," *
verses.halfverse: and my foes rejoice that I have fallen.

verses.verse: But I put my trust in your mercy; *
verses.halfverse: my heart is joyful because of your saving help.

verses.verse: I will sing to the LORD, for he has dealt with me richly; *
verses.halfverse: I will praise the Name of the Lord Most High.

verses.verse: The fool has said in his heart, "There is no God." *
verses.halfverse: All are corrupt and commit abominable acts; there is none who does any good.

verses.verse: The LORD looks down from heaven upon us all, *
verses.halfverse: to see if there is any who is wise, if there is one who seeks after God.

verses.verse: Every one has proved faithless; all alike have turned bad; *
verses.halfverse: there is none who does good; no, not one.

verses.verse: Have they no knowledge, all those evildoers *
verses.halfverse: who eat up my people like bread and do not call upon the LORD?

verses.verse: See how they tremble with fear, *
verses.halfverse: because God is in the company of the righteous.

verses.verse: Their aim is to confound the plans of the afflicted, *
verses.halfverse: but the LORD is their refuge.

verses.verse: Oh, that Israel's deliverance would come out of Zion! *
verses.halfverse: when the LORD restores the fortunes of his people, Jacob will rejoice and Israel be glad.

verses.verse: LORD, who may dwell in your tabernacle? *
verses.halfverse: who may abide upon your holy hill?

verses.verse: Whoever leads a blameless life and does what is right, *
verses.halfverse: who speaks the truth from his heart.

verses.verse: There is no guile upon his tongue; he does no evil to his friend; *
verses.halfverse: he does not heap contempt upon his neighbor.

verses.verse: In his sight the wicked is rejected, *
verses.halfverse: but he honors those who fear the LORD.

verses.verse: He has sworn to do no wrong *
verses.halfverse: and does not take back his word.

verses.verse: He does not give his money in hope of gain, *
verses.halfverse: nor does he take a bribe against the innocent.

verses.verse: Whoever does these things *
verses.halfverse: shall never be overthrown.

verses.verse: Protect me, O God, for I take refuge in you; *
verses.halfverse: I have said to the LORD, "You are my Lord, my good above all other."

verses.verse: All my delight is upon the godly that are in the land, *
verses.halfverse: upon those who are noble among the people.

verses.verse: But those who run after other gods *
verses.halfverse: shall have their troubles multiplied.

verses.verse: Their libations of blood I will not offer, *
verses.halfverse: nor take the names of their gods upon my lips.

verses.verse: O LORD, you are my portion and my cup; *
verses.halfverse: it is you who uphold my lot.

verses.verse: My boundaries enclose a pleasant land; *
verses.halfverse: indeed, I have a goodly heritage.

verses.verse: I will bless the LORD who gives me counsel; *
verses.halfverse: my heart teaches me, night after night.

verses.verse: I have set the LORD always before me; *
verses.halfverse: because he is at my right hand I shall not fall.

verses.verse: My heart, therefore, is glad, and my spirit rejoices; *
verses.halfverse: my body also shall rest in hope.

verses.verse: For you will not abandon me to the grave, *
verses.halfverse: nor let your holy one see the Pit.

verses.verse: You will show me the path of life; *
verses.halfverse: in your presence there is fullness of joy, and in your right hand are pleasures for evermore.

verses.verse: Hear my plea of innocence, O LORD; give heed to my cry; *
verses.halfverse: listen to my prayer, which does not come from lying lips.

verses.verse: Let my vindication come forth from your presence; *
verses.halfverse: let your eyes be fixed on justice.

verses.verse: Weigh my heart, summon me by night, *
verses.halfverse: melt me down; you will find no impurity in me.

verses.verse: I give no offense with my mouth as others do; *
verses.halfverse: I have heeded the words of your lips.

verses.verse: My footsteps hold fast to the ways of your law; *
verses.halfverse: in your paths my feet shall not stumble.

verses.verse: I call upon you, O God, for you will answer me; *
verses.halfverse: incline your ear to me and hear my words.

verses.verse: Show me your marvelous loving-kindness, *
verses.halfverse: O Savior of those who take refuge at your right hand from those who rise up against them.

verses.verse: Keep me as the apple of your eye; *
verses.halfverse: hide me under the shadow of your wings,

verses.verse: From the wicked who assault me, *
verses.halfverse: from my deadly enemies who surround me.

verses.verse: They have closed their heart to pity, *
verses.halfverse: and their mouth speaks proud things.

verses.verse: They press me hard, now they surround me, *
verses.halfverse: watching how they may cast me to the ground,

verses.verse: Like a lion, greedy for its prey, *
verses.halfverse: and like a young lion lurking in secret places.

verses.verse: Arise, O LORD; confront them and bring them down; *
verses.halfverse: deliver me from the wicked by your sword.

verses.verse: Deliver me, O LORD, by your hand *
verses.halfverse: from those whose portion in life is this world;

verses.verse: Whose bellies you fill with your treasure, *
verses.halfverse: who are well supplied with children and leave their wealth to their little ones.

verses.verse: But at my vindication I shall see your face; *
verses.halfverse: when I awake, I shall be satisfied, beholding your likeness.

verses.verse: I love you, O LORD my strength, *
verses.halfverse: O LORD my stronghold, my crag, and my haven.

verses.verse: My God, my rock in whom I put my trust, *
verses.halfverse: my shield, the horn of my salvation, and my refuge; you are worthy of praise.

verses.verse: I will call upon the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and so shall I be saved from my enemies.

verses.verse: The breakers of death rolled over me, *
verses.halfverse: and the torrents of oblivion made me afraid.

verses.verse: The cords of hell entangled me, *
verses.halfverse: and the snares of death were set for me.

verses.verse: I called upon the LORD in my distress *
verses.halfverse: and cried out to my God for help.

verses.verse: He heard my voice from his heavenly dwelling; *
verses.halfverse: my cry of anguish came to his ears.

verses.verse: The earth reeled and rocked; *
verses.halfverse: the roots of the mountains shook; they reeled because of his anger.

verses.verse: Smoke rose from his nostrils and a consuming fire out of his mouth; *
verses.halfverse: hot burning coals blazed forth from him.

verses.verse: He parted the heavens and came down *
verses.halfverse: with a storm cloud under his feet.

verses.verse: He mounted on cherubim and flew; *
verses.halfverse: he swooped on the wings of the wind.

verses.verse: He wrapped darkness about him; *
verses.halfverse: he made dark waters and thick clouds his pavilion.

verses.verse: From the brightness of his presence, through the clouds, *
verses.halfverse: burst hailstones and coals of fire.

verses.verse: The LORD thundered out of heaven; *
verses.halfverse: the Most High uttered his voice.

verses.verse: He loosed his arrows and scattered them; *
verses.halfverse: he hurled thunderbolts and routed them.

verses.verse: The beds of the seas were uncovered, and the foundations of the world laid bare, *
verses.halfverse: at your battle cry, O LORD, at the blast of the breath of your nostrils.

verses.verse: He reached down from on high and grasped me; *
verses.halfverse: he drew me out of great waters.

verses.verse: He delivered me from my strong enemies and from those who hated me; *
verses.halfverse: for they were too mighty for me.

verses.verse: They confronted me in the day of my disaster; *
verses.halfverse: but the LORD was my support.

verses.verse: He brought me out into an open place; *
verses.halfverse: he rescued me because he delighted in me.

verses.verse: The LORD rewarded me because of my righteous dealing; *
verses.halfverse: because my hands were clean he rewarded me;

verses.verse: For I have kept the ways of the LORD *
verses.halfverse: and have not offended against my God;

verses.verse: For all his judgments are before my eyes, *
verses.halfverse: and his decrees I have not put away from me;

verses.verse: For I have been blameless with him *
verses.halfverse: and have kept myself from iniquity;

verses.verse: Therefore the LORD rewarded me according to my righteous dealing, *
verses.halfverse: because of the cleanness of my hands in his sight.

verses.verse: With the faithful you show yourself faithful, O God; *
verses.halfverse: with the forthright you show yourself forthright.

verses.verse: With the pure you show yourself pure, *
verses.halfverse: but with the crooked you are wily.

verses.verse: You will save a lowly people, *
verses.halfverse: but you will humble the haughty eyes.

verses.verse: You, O LORD, are my lamp; *
verses.halfverse: my God, you make my darkness bright.

verses.verse: With you I will break down an enclosure; *
verses.halfverse: with the help of my God I will scale any wall.

verses.verse: As for God, his ways are perfect; the words of the LORD are tried in the fire; *
verses.halfverse: he is a shield to all who trust in him.

verses.verse: For who is God, but the LORD? *
verses.halfverse: who is the Rock, except our God?

verses.verse: It is God who girds me about with strength *
verses.halfverse: and makes my way secure.

verses.verse: He makes me sure-footed like a deer *
verses.halfverse: and lets me stand firm on the heights.

verses.verse: He trains my hands for battle *
verses.halfverse: and my arms for bending even a bow of bronze.

verses.verse: You have given me your shield of victory; *
verses.halfverse: your right hand also sustains me; your loving care makes me great.

verses.verse: You lengthen my stride beneath me, *
verses.halfverse: and my ankles do not give way.

verses.verse: I pursue my enemies and overtake them; *
verses.halfverse: I will not turn back till I have destroyed them.

verses.verse: I strike them down, and they cannot rise; *
verses.halfverse: they fall defeated at my feet.

verses.verse: You have girded me with strength for the battle; *
verses.halfverse: you have cast down my adversaries beneath me; you have put my enemies to flight.

verses.verse: I destroy those who hate me; they cry out, but there is none to help them; *
verses.halfverse: they cry to the LORD, but he does not answer.

verses.verse: I beat them small like dust before the wind; *
verses.halfverse: I trample them like mud in the streets.

verses.verse: You deliver me from the strife of the peoples; *
verses.halfverse: you put me at the head of the nations.

verses.verse: A people I have not known shall serve me; no sooner shall they hear than they shall obey me; *
verses.halfverse: strangers will cringe before me.

verses.verse: The foreign peoples will lose heart; *
verses.halfverse: they shall come trembling out of their strongholds.

verses.verse: The LORD lives! Blessed is my Rock! *
verses.halfverse: Exalted is the God of my salvation!

verses.verse: He is the God who gave me victory *
verses.halfverse: and cast down the peoples beneath me.

verses.verse: You rescued me from the fury of my enemies; you exalted me above those who rose against me; *
verses.halfverse: you saved me from my deadly foe.

verses.verse: Therefore will I extol you among the nations, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and sing praises to your Name.

verses.verse: He multiplies the victories of his king; *
verses.halfverse: he shows loving-kindness to his anointed, to David and his descendants for ever.

verses.verse: The heavens declare the glory of God, *
verses.halfverse: and the firmament shows his handiwork.

verses.verse: One day tells its tale to another, *
verses.halfverse: and one night imparts knowledge to another.

verses.verse: Although they have no words or language, *
verses.halfverse: and their voices are not heard,

verses.verse: Their sound has gone out into all lands, *
verses.halfverse: and their message to the ends of the world.

verses.verse: In the deep has he set a pavilion for the sun; *
verses.halfverse: it comes forth like a bridegroom out of his chamber; it rejoices like a champion to run its course.

verses.verse: It goes forth from the uttermost edge of the heavens and runs about to the end of it again; *
verses.halfverse: nothing is hidden from its burning heat.

verses.verse: The law of the LORD is perfect and revives the soul; *
verses.halfverse: the testimony of the LORD is sure and gives wisdom to the innocent.

verses.verse: The statutes of the LORD are just and rejoice the heart; *
verses.halfverse: the commandment of the LORD is clear and gives light to the eyes.

verses.verse: The fear of the LORD is clean and endures for ever; *
verses.halfverse: the judgments of the LORD are true and righteous altogether.

verses.verse: More to be desired are they than gold, more than much fine gold, *
verses.halfverse: sweeter far than honey, than honey in the comb.

verses.verse: By them also is your servant enlightened, *
verses.halfverse: and in keeping them there is great reward.

verses.verse: Who can tell how often he offends? *
verses.halfverse: cleanse me from my secret faults.

verses.verse: Above all, keep your servant from presumptuous sins; let them not get dominion over me; *
verses.halfverse: then shall I be whole and sound, and innocent of a great offense.

verses.verse: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in your sight, *
verses.halfverse: O LORD, my strength and my redeemer.

verses.verse: May the LORD answer you in the day of trouble, *
verses.halfverse: the Name of the God of Jacob defend you;

verses.verse: Send you help from his holy place *
verses.halfverse: and strengthen you out of Zion;

verses.verse: Remember all your offerings *
verses.halfverse: and accept your burnt sacrifice;

verses.verse: Grant you your heart's desire *
verses.halfverse: and prosper all your plans.

verses.verse: We will shout for joy at your victory and triumph in the Name of our God; *
verses.halfverse: may the LORD grant all your requests.

verses.verse: Now I know that the LORD gives victory to his anointed; *
verses.halfverse: he will answer him out of his holy heaven, with the victorious strength of his right hand.

verses.verse: Some put their trust in chariots and some in horses, *
verses.halfverse: but we will call upon the Name of the LORD our God.

verses.verse: They collapse and fall down, *
verses.halfverse: but we will arise and stand upright.

verses.verse: O LORD, give victory to the king *
verses.halfverse: and answer us when we call.

verses.verse: The king rejoices in your strength, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: how greatly he exults in your victory!

verses.verse: You have given him his heart's desire; *
verses.halfverse: you have not denied him the request of his lips.

verses.verse: For you meet him with blessings of prosperity, *
verses.halfverse: and set a crown of fine gold upon his head.

verses.verse: He asked you for life, and you gave it to him: *
verses.halfverse: length of days, for ever and ever.

verses.verse: His honor is great, because of your victory; *
verses.halfverse: splendor and majesty have you bestowed upon him.

verses.verse: For you will give him everlasting felicity *
verses.halfverse: and will make him glad with the joy of your presence.

verses.verse: For the king puts his trust in the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: because of the loving-kindness of the Most High, he will not fall.

verses.verse: Your hand will lay hold upon all your enemies; *
verses.halfverse: your right hand will seize all those who hate you.

verses.verse: You will make them like a fiery furnace *
verses.halfverse: at the time of your appearing, O LORD;

verses.verse: You will swallow them up in your wrath, *
verses.halfverse: and fire shall consume them.

verses.verse: You will destroy their offspring from the land *
verses.halfverse: and their descendants from among the peoples of the earth.

verses.verse: Though they intend evil against you and devise wicked schemes, *
verses.halfverse: yet they shall not prevail.

verses.verse: For you will put them to flight *
verses.halfverse: and aim your arrows at them.

verses.verse: Be exalted, O LORD, in your might; *
verses.halfverse: we will sing and praise your power.

verses.verse: My God, my God, why have you forsaken me? *
verses.halfverse: and are so far from my cry and from the words of my distress?

verses.verse: O my God, I cry in the daytime, but you do not answer; *
verses.halfverse: by night as well, but I find no rest.

verses.verse: Yet you are the Holy One, *
verses.halfverse: enthroned upon the praises of Israel.

verses.verse: Our forefathers put their trust in you; *
verses.halfverse: they trusted, and you delivered them.

verses.verse: They cried out to you and were delivered; *
verses.halfverse: they trusted in you and were not put to shame.

verses.verse: But as for me, I am a worm and no man, *
verses.halfverse: scorned by all and despised by the people.

verses.verse: All who see me laugh me to scorn; *
verses.halfverse: they curl their lips and wag their heads, saying,

verses.verse: "He trusted in the LORD; let him deliver him; *
verses.halfverse: let him rescue him, if he delights in him."

verses.verse: Yet you are he who took me out of the womb, *
verses.halfverse: and kept me safe upon my mother's breast.

verses.verse: I have been entrusted to you ever since I was born; *
verses.halfverse: you were my God when I was still in my mother's womb.

verses.verse: Be not far from me, for trouble is near, *
verses.halfverse: and there is none to help.

verses.verse: Many young bulls encircle me; *
verses.halfverse: strong bulls of Bashan surround me.

verses.verse: They open wide their jaws at me, *
verses.halfverse: like a ravening and a roaring lion.

verses.verse: I am poured out like water; all my bones are out of joint; *
verses.halfverse: my heart within my breast is melting wax.

verses.verse: My mouth is dried out like a pot-sherd; my tongue sticks to the roof of my mouth; *
verses.halfverse: and you have laid me in the dust of the grave.

verses.verse: Packs of dogs close me in, and gangs of evildoers circle around me; *
verses.halfverse: they pierce my hands and my feet; I can count all my bones.

verses.verse: They stare and gloat over me; *
verses.halfverse: they divide my garments among them; they cast lots for my clothing.

verses.verse: Be not far away, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: you are my strength; hasten to help me.

verses.verse: Save me from the sword, *
verses.halfverse: my life from the power of the dog.

verses.verse: Save me from the lion's mouth, *
verses.halfverse: my wretched body from the horns of wild bulls.

verses.verse: I will declare your Name to my brethren; *
verses.halfverse: in the midst of the congregation I will praise you.

verses.verse: Praise the LORD, you that fear him; *
verses.halfverse: stand in awe of him, O offspring of Israel; all you of Jacob's line, give glory.

verses.verse: For he does not despise nor abhor the poor in their poverty; neither does he hide his face from them; *
verses.halfverse: but when they cry to him he hears them.

verses.verse: My praise is of him in the great assembly; *
verses.halfverse: I will perform my vows in the presence of those who worship him.

verses.verse: The poor shall eat and be satisfied, and those who seek the LORD shall praise him: *
verses.halfverse: "May your heart live for ever!"

verses.verse: All the ends of the earth shall remember and turn to the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and all the families of the nations bow before him.

verses.verse: For kingship belongs to the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: he rules over the nations.

verses.verse: To him alone all who sleep in the earth bow down in worship; *
verses.halfverse: all who go down to the dust fall before him.

verses.verse: My soul shall live for him; my descendants shall serve him; *
verses.halfverse: they shall be known as the LORD'S for ever.

verses.verse: They shall come and make known to a people yet unborn *
verses.halfverse: the saving deeds that he has done.

verses.verse: The LORD is my shepherd; *
verses.halfverse: I shall not be in want.

verses.verse: He makes me lie down in green pastures *
verses.halfverse: and leads me beside still waters.

verses.verse: He revives my soul *
verses.halfverse: and guides me along right pathways for his Name's sake.

verses.verse: Though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I shall fear no evil; *
verses.halfverse: for you are with me; your rod and your staff, they comfort me.

verses.verse: You spread a table before me in the presence of those who trouble me; *
verses.halfverse: you have anointed my head with oil, and my cup is running over.

verses.verse: Surely your goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life, *
verses.halfverse: and I will dwell in the house of the LORD for ever.

verses.verse: The earth is the LORD'S and all that is in it, *
verses.halfverse: the world and all who dwell therein.

verses.verse: For it is he who founded it upon the seas *
verses.halfverse: and made it firm upon the rivers of the deep.

verses.verse: "Who can ascend the hill of the LORD? *
verses.halfverse: and who can stand in his holy place?"

verses.verse: "Those who have clean hands and a pure heart, *
verses.halfverse: who have not pledged themselves to falsehood, nor sworn by what is a fraud.

verses.verse: They shall receive a blessing from the LORD *
verses.halfverse: and a just reward from the God of their salvation."

verses.verse: Such is the generation of those who seek him, *
verses.halfverse: of those who seek your face, O God of Jacob.

verses.verse: Lift up your heads, O gates; lift them high, O everlasting doors; *
verses.halfverse: and the King of glory shall come in.

verses.verse: "Who is this King of glory?" *
verses.halfverse: "The LORD, strong and mighty, the LORD, mighty in battle."

verses.verse: Lift up your heads, O gates; lift them high, O everlasting doors; *
verses.halfverse: and the King of glory shall come in.

verses.verse: "Who is he, this King of glory?" *
verses.halfverse: "The LORD of hosts, he is the King of glory."

verses.verse: To you, O LORD, I lift up my soul; my God, I put my trust in you; *
verses.halfverse: let me not be humiliated, nor let my enemies triumph over me.

verses.verse: Let none who look to you be put to shame; *
verses.halfverse: let the treacherous be disappointed in their schemes.

verses.verse: Show me your ways, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and teach me your paths.

verses.verse: Lead me in your truth and teach me, *
verses.halfverse: for you are the God of my salvation; in you have I trusted all the day long.

verses.verse: Remember, O LORD, your compassion and love, *
verses.halfverse: for they are from everlasting.

verses.verse: Remember not the sins of my youth and my transgressions; *
verses.halfverse: remember me according to your love and for the sake of your goodness, O LORD.

verses.verse: Gracious and upright is the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: therefore he teaches sinners in his way.

verses.verse: He guides the humble in doing right *
verses.halfverse: and teaches his way to the lowly.

verses.verse: All the paths of the LORD are love and faithfulness *
verses.halfverse: to those who keep his covenant and his testimonies.

verses.verse: For your Name's sake, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: forgive my sin, for it is great.

verses.verse: Who are they who fear the LORD? *
verses.halfverse: he will teach them the way that they should choose.

verses.verse: They shall dwell in prosperity, *
verses.halfverse: and their offspring shall inherit the land.

verses.verse: The LORD is a friend to those who fear him *
verses.halfverse: and will show them his covenant.

verses.verse: My eyes are ever looking to the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: for he shall pluck my feet out of the net.

verses.verse: Turn to me and have pity on me, *
verses.halfverse: for I am left alone and in misery.

verses.verse: The sorrows of my heart have increased; *
verses.halfverse: bring me out of my troubles.

verses.verse: Look upon my adversity and misery *
verses.halfverse: and forgive me all my sin.

verses.verse: Look upon my enemies, for they are many, *
verses.halfverse: and they bear a violent hatred against me.

verses.verse: Protect my life and deliver me; *
verses.halfverse: let me not be put to shame, for I have trusted in you.

verses.verse: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me, *
verses.halfverse: for my hope has been in you.

verses.verse: Deliver Israel, O God, *
verses.halfverse: out of all his troubles.

verses.verse: Give judgment for me, O LORD, for I have lived with integrity; *
verses.halfverse: I have trusted in the Lord and have not faltered.

verses.verse: Test me, O LORD, and try me; *
verses.halfverse: examine my heart and my mind.

verses.verse: For your love is before my eyes; *
verses.halfverse: I have walked faithfully with you.

verses.verse: I have not sat with the worthless, *
verses.halfverse: nor do I consort with the deceitful.

verses.verse: I have hated the company of evildoers; *
verses.halfverse: I will not sit down with the wicked.

verses.verse: I will wash my hands in innocence, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: that I may go in procession round your altar,

verses.verse: Singing aloud a song of thanksgiving *
verses.halfverse: and recounting all your wonderful deeds.

verses.verse: LORD, I love the house in which you dwell *
verses.halfverse: and the place where your glory abides.

verses.verse: Do not sweep me away with sinners, *
verses.halfverse: nor my life with those who thirst for blood,

verses.verse: Whose hands are full of evil plots, *
verses.halfverse: and their right hand full of bribes.

verses.verse: As for me, I will live with integrity; *
verses.halfverse: redeem me, O LORD, and have pity on me.

verses.verse: My foot stands on level ground; *
verses.halfverse: in the full assembly I will bless the LORD.

verses.verse: The LORD is my light and my salvation; whom then shall I fear? *
verses.halfverse: the LORD is the strength of my life; of whom then shall I be afraid?

verses.verse: When evildoers came upon me to eat up my flesh, *
verses.halfverse: it was they, my foes and my adversaries, who stumbled and fell.

verses.verse: Though an army should encamp against me, *
verses.halfverse: yet my heart shall not be afraid;

verses.verse: And though war should rise up against me, *
verses.halfverse: yet will I put my trust in him.

verses.verse: One thing have I asked of the LORD; one thing I seek; *
verses.halfverse: that I may dwell in the house of the LORD all the days of my life;

verses.verse: To behold the fair beauty of the LORD *
verses.halfverse: and to seek him in his temple.

verses.verse: For in the day of trouble he shall keep me safe in his shelter; *
verses.halfverse: he shall hide me in the secrecy of his dwelling and set me high upon a rock.

verses.verse: Even now he lifts up my head *
verses.halfverse: above my enemies round about me.

verses.verse: Therefore I will offer in his dwelling an oblation with sounds of great gladness; *
verses.halfverse: I will sing and make music to the LORD.

verses.verse: Hearken to my voice, O LORD, when I call; *
verses.halfverse: have mercy on me and answer me.

verses.verse: You speak in my heart and say, "Seek my face." *
verses.halfverse: Your face, LORD, will I seek.

verses.verse: Hide not your face from me, *
verses.halfverse: nor turn away your servant in displeasure.

verses.verse: You have been my helper; cast me not away; *
verses.halfverse: do not forsake me, O God of my salvation.

verses.verse: Though my father and my mother forsake me, *
verses.halfverse: the LORD will sustain me.

verses.verse: Show me your way, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: lead me on a level path, because of my enemies.

verses.verse: Deliver me not into the hand of my adversaries, *
verses.halfverse: for false witnesses have risen up against me, and also those who speak malice.

verses.verse: What if I had not believed that I should see the goodness of the LORD *
verses.halfverse: in the land of the living!

verses.verse: O tarry and await the LORD'S pleasure; be strong, and he shall comfort your heart; *
verses.halfverse: wait patiently for the LORD.

verses.verse: O LORD, I call to you; my Rock, do not be deaf to my cry; *
verses.halfverse: lest, if you do not hear me, I become like those who go down to the Pit.

verses.verse: Hear the voice of my prayer when I cry out to you, *
verses.halfverse: when I lift up my hands to your holy of holies.

verses.verse: Do not snatch me away with the wicked or with the evildoers, *
verses.halfverse: who speak peaceably with their neighbors, while strife is in their hearts.

verses.verse: Repay them according to their deeds, *
verses.halfverse: and according to the wickedness of their actions.

verses.verse: According to the work of their hands repay them, *
verses.halfverse: and give them their just deserts.

verses.verse: They have no understanding of the LORD'S doings, nor of the works of his hands; *
verses.halfverse: therefore he will break them down and not build them up.

verses.verse: Blessed is the LORD! *
verses.halfverse: for he has heard the voice of my prayer.

verses.verse: The LORD is my strength and my shield; *
verses.halfverse: my heart trusts in him, and I have been helped;

verses.verse: Therefore my heart dances for joy, *
verses.halfverse: and in my song will I praise him.

verses.verse: The LORD is the strength of his people, *
verses.halfverse: a safe refuge for his anointed.

verses.verse: Save your people and bless your inheritance; *
verses.halfverse: shepherd them and carry them for ever.

verses.verse: Ascribe to the LORD, you gods, *
verses.halfverse: ascribe to the LORD glory and strength.

verses.verse: Ascribe to the LORD the glory due his Name; *
verses.halfverse: worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness.

verses.verse: The voice of the LORD is upon the waters; the God of glory thunders; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD is upon the mighty waters.

verses.verse: The voice of the LORD is a powerful voice; *
verses.halfverse: the voice of the LORD is a voice of splendor.

verses.verse: The voice of the LORD breaks the cedar trees; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD breaks the cedars of Lebanon;

verses.verse: He makes Lebanon skip like a calf, *
verses.halfverse: and Mount Hermon like a young wild ox.

verses.verse: The voice of the LORD splits the flames of fire; the voice of the LORD shakes the wilderness; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD shakes the wilderness of Kadesh.

verses.verse: The voice of the LORD makes the oak trees writhe *
verses.halfverse: and strips the forests bare.

verses.verse: And in the temple of the LORD *
verses.halfverse: all are crying, "Glory!"

verses.verse: The LORD sits enthroned above the flood; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD sits enthroned as King for evermore.

verses.verse: The LORD shall give strength to his people; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD shall give his people the blessing of peace.

verses.verse: I will exalt you, O LORD, because you have lifted me up *
verses.halfverse: and have not let my enemies triumph over me.

verses.verse: O LORD my God, I cried out to you, *
verses.halfverse: and you restored me to health.

verses.verse: You brought me up, O LORD, from the dead; *
verses.halfverse: you restored my life as I was going down to the grave.

verses.verse: Sing to the LORD, you servants of his; *
verses.halfverse: give thanks for the remembrance of his holiness.

verses.verse: For his wrath endures but the twinkling of an eye, *
verses.halfverse: his favor for a lifetime.

verses.verse: Weeping may spend the night, *
verses.halfverse: but joy comes in the morning.

verses.verse: While I felt secure, I said, "I shall never be disturbed. *
verses.halfverse: You, LORD, with your favor, made me as strong as the mountains."

verses.verse: Then you hid your face, *
verses.halfverse: and I was filled with fear.

verses.verse: I cried to you, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: I pleaded with the Lord, saying,

verses.verse: "What profit is there in my blood, if I go down to the Pit? *
verses.halfverse: will the dust praise you or declare your faithfulness?

verses.verse: Hear, O LORD, and have mercy upon me; *
verses.halfverse: O LORD, be my helper."

verses.verse: You have turned my wailing into dancing; *
verses.halfverse: you have put off my sack-cloth and clothed me with joy.

verses.verse: Therefore my heart sings to you without ceasing; *
verses.halfverse: O LORD my God, I will give you thanks for ever.

verses.verse: In you, O LORD, have I taken refuge; let me never be put to shame; *
verses.halfverse: deliver me in your righteousness.

verses.verse: Incline your ear to me; *
verses.halfverse: make haste to deliver me.

verses.verse: Be my strong rock, a castle to keep me safe, for you are my crag and my stronghold; *
verses.halfverse: for the sake of your Name, lead me and guide me.

verses.verse: Take me out of the net that they have secretly set for me, *
verses.halfverse: for you are my tower of strength.

verses.verse: Into your hands I commend my spirit, *
verses.halfverse: for you have redeemed me, O LORD, O God of truth.

verses.verse: I hate those who cling to worthless idols, *
verses.halfverse: and I put my trust in the LORD.

verses.verse: I will rejoice and be glad because of your mercy; *
verses.halfverse: for you have seen my affliction; you know my distress.

verses.verse: You have not shut me up in the power of the enemy; *
verses.halfverse: you have set my feet in an open place.

verses.verse: Have mercy on me, O LORD, for I am in trouble; *
verses.halfverse: my eye is consumed with sorrow, and also my throat and my belly.

verses.verse: For my life is wasted with grief, and my years with sighing; *
verses.halfverse: my strength fails me because of affliction, and my bones are consumed.

verses.verse: I have become a reproach to all my enemies and even to my neighbors, a dismay to those of my acquaintance; *
verses.halfverse: when they see me in the street they avoid me.

verses.verse: I am forgotten like a dead man, out of mind; *
verses.halfverse: I am as useless as a broken pot.

verses.verse: For I have heard the whispering of the crowd; fear is all around; *
verses.halfverse: they put their heads together against me; they plot to take my life.

verses.verse: But as for me, I have trusted in you, O LORD. *
verses.halfverse: I have said, "You are my God.

verses.verse: My times are in your hand; *
verses.halfverse: rescue me from the hand of my enemies, and from those who persecute me.

verses.verse: Make your face to shine upon your servant, *
verses.halfverse: and in your loving-kindness save me."

verses.verse: LORD, let me not be ashamed for having called upon you; *
verses.halfverse: rather, let the wicked be put to shame; let them be silent in the grave.

verses.verse: Let the lying lips be silenced which speak against the righteous, *
verses.halfverse: haughtily, disdainfully, and with contempt.

verses.verse: How great is your goodness, O LORD! which you have laid up for those who fear you; *
verses.halfverse: which you have done in the sight of all for those who put their trust in you.

verses.verse: You hide them in the covert of your presence from those who slander them; *
verses.halfverse: you keep them in your shelter from the strife of tongues.

verses.verse: Blessed be the LORD! *
verses.halfverse: for he has shown me the wonders of his love in a besieged city.

verses.verse: Yet I said in my alarm, I have been cut off from the sight of your eyes." *
verses.halfverse: Nevertheless, you heard the sound of my entreaty when I cried out to you.

verses.verse: Love the LORD, all you who worship him; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD protects the faithful, but repays to the full those who act haughtily.

verses.verse: Be strong and let your heart take courage, *
verses.halfverse: all you who wait for the LORD.

verses.verse: Happy are they whose transgressions are forgiven, *
verses.halfverse: and whose sin is put away!

verses.verse: Happy are they to whom the LORD imputes no guilt, *
verses.halfverse: and in whose spirit there is no guile!

verses.verse: While I held my tongue, my bones withered away, *
verses.halfverse: because of my groaning all day long.

verses.verse: For your hand was heavy upon me day and night; *
verses.halfverse: my moisture was dried up as in the heat of summer.

verses.verse: Then I acknowledged my sin to you, *
verses.halfverse: and did not conceal my guilt.

verses.verse: I said, "I will confess my transgressions to the LORD." *
verses.halfverse: Then you forgave me the guilt of my sin.

verses.verse: Therefore all the faithful will make their prayers to you in time of trouble; *
verses.halfverse: when the great waters overflow, they shall not reach them.

verses.verse: You are my hiding-place; you preserve me from trouble; *
verses.halfverse: you surround me with shouts of deliverance.

verses.verse: "I will instruct you and teach you in the way that you should go; *
verses.halfverse: I will guide you with my eye.

verses.verse: Do not be like horse or mule, which have no understanding; *
verses.halfverse: who must be fitted with bit and bridle, or else they will not stay near you."

verses.verse: Great are the tribulations of the wicked; *
verses.halfverse: but mercy embraces those who trust in the LORD.

verses.verse: Be glad, you righteous, and rejoice in the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: shout for joy, all who are true of heart.

verses.verse: Rejoice in the LORD, you righteous; *
verses.halfverse: it is good for the just to sing praises.

verses.verse: Praise the LORD with the harp; *
verses.halfverse: play to him upon the psaltery and lyre.

verses.verse: Sing for him a new song; *
verses.halfverse: sound a fanfare with all your skill upon the trumpet.

verses.verse: For the word of the LORD is right, *
verses.halfverse: and all his works are sure.

verses.verse: He loves righteousness and justice; *
verses.halfverse: the loving-kindness of the LORD fills the whole earth.

verses.verse: By the word of the LORD were the heavens made, *
verses.halfverse: by the breath of his mouth all the heavenly hosts.

verses.verse: He gathers up the waters of the ocean as in a water-skin *
verses.halfverse: and stores up the depths of the sea.

verses.verse: Let all the earth fear the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: let all who dwell in the world stand in awe of him.

verses.verse: For he spoke, and it came to pass; *
verses.halfverse: he commanded, and it stood fast.

verses.verse: The LORD brings the will of the nations to naught; *
verses.halfverse: he thwarts the designs of the peoples.

verses.verse: But the LORD'S will stands fast for ever, *
verses.halfverse: and the designs of his heart from age to age.

verses.verse: Happy is the nation whose God is the LORD! *
verses.halfverse: happy the people he has chosen to be his own!

verses.verse: The LORD looks down from heaven, *
verses.halfverse: and beholds all the people in the world.

verses.verse: From where he sits enthroned he turns his gaze *
verses.halfverse: on all who dwell on the earth.

verses.verse: He fashions all the hearts of them *
verses.halfverse: and understands all their works.

verses.verse: There is no king that can be saved by a mighty army; *
verses.halfverse: a strong man is not delivered by his great strength.

verses.verse: The horse is a vain hope for deliverance; *
verses.halfverse: for all its strength it cannot save.

verses.verse: Behold, the eye of the LORD is upon those who fear him, *
verses.halfverse: on those who wait upon his love,

verses.verse: To pluck their lives from death, *
verses.halfverse: and to feed them in time of famine.

verses.verse: Our soul waits for the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: he is our help and our shield.

verses.verse: Indeed, our heart rejoices in him, *
verses.halfverse: for in his holy Name we put our trust.

verses.verse: Let your loving-kindness, O LORD, be upon us, *
verses.halfverse: as we have put our trust in you.

verses.verse: I will bless the LORD at all times; *
verses.halfverse: his praise shall ever be in my mouth.

verses.verse: I will glory in the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: let the humble hear and rejoice.

verses.verse: Proclaim with me the greatness of the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: let us exalt his Name together.

verses.verse: I sought the LORD, and he answered me *
verses.halfverse: and delivered me out of all my terror.

verses.verse: Look upon him and be radiant, *
verses.halfverse: and let not your faces be ashamed.

verses.verse: I called in my affliction and the LORD heard me *
verses.halfverse: and saved me from all my troubles.

verses.verse: The angel of the LORD encompasses those who fear him, *
verses.halfverse: and he will deliver them.

verses.verse: Taste and see that the LORD is good; *
verses.halfverse: happy are they who trust in him!

verses.verse: Fear the LORD, you that are his saints, *
verses.halfverse: for those who fear him lack nothing.

verses.verse: The young lions lack and suffer hunger, *
verses.halfverse: but those who seek the LORD lack nothing that is good.

verses.verse: Come, children, and listen to me; *
verses.halfverse: I will teach you the fear of the LORD.

verses.verse: Who among you loves life *
verses.halfverse: and desires long life to enjoy prosperity?

verses.verse: Keep your tongue from evil-speaking *
verses.halfverse: and your lips from lying words.

verses.verse: Turn from evil and do good; *
verses.halfverse: seek peace and pursue it.

verses.verse: The eyes of the LORD are upon the righteous, *
verses.halfverse: and his ears are open to their cry.

verses.verse: The face of the LORD is against those who do evil, *
verses.halfverse: to root out the remembrance of them from the earth.

verses.verse: The righteous cry, and the LORD hears them *
verses.halfverse: and delivers them from all their troubles.

verses.verse: The LORD is near to the brokenhearted *
verses.halfverse: and will save those whose spirits are crushed.

verses.verse: Many are the troubles of the righteous, *
verses.halfverse: but the LORD will deliver him out of them all.

verses.verse: He will keep safe all his bones; *
verses.halfverse: not one of them shall be broken.

verses.verse: Evil shall slay the wicked, *
verses.halfverse: and those who hate the righteous will be punished.

verses.verse: The LORD ransoms the life of his servants, *
verses.halfverse: and none will be punished who trust in him.

verses.verse: Fight those who fight me, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: attack those who are attacking me.

verses.verse: Take up shield and armor *
verses.halfverse: and rise up to help me.

verses.verse: Draw the sword and bar the way against those who pursue me; *
verses.halfverse: say to my soul, "I am your salvation."

verses.verse: Let those who seek after my life be shamed and humbled; *
verses.halfverse: let those who plot my ruin fall back and be dismayed.

verses.verse: Let them be like chaff before the wind, *
verses.halfverse: and let the angel of the LORD drive them away.

verses.verse: Let their way be dark and slippery, *
verses.halfverse: and let the angel of the LORD pursue them.

verses.verse: For they have secretly spread a net for me without a cause; *
verses.halfverse: without a cause they have dug a pit to take me alive.

verses.verse: Let ruin come upon them unawares; *
verses.halfverse: let them be caught in the net they hid; let them fall into the pit they dug.

verses.verse: Then I will be joyful in the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: I will glory in his victory.

verses.verse: My very bones will say, "LORD, who is like you? *
verses.halfverse: You deliver the poor from those who are too strong for them, the poor and needy from those who rob them."

verses.verse: Malicious witnesses rise up against me; *
verses.halfverse: they charge me with matters I know nothing about.

verses.verse: They pay me evil in exchange for good; *
verses.halfverse: my soul is full of despair.

verses.verse: But when they were sick I dressed in sack-cloth *
verses.halfverse: and humbled myself by fasting.

verses.verse: I prayed with my whole heart, as one would for a friend or a brother; *
verses.halfverse: I behaved like one who mourns for his mother, bowed down and grieving.

verses.verse: But when I stumbled, they were glad and gathered together; they gathered against me; *
verses.halfverse: strangers whom I did not know tore me to pieces and would not stop.

verses.verse: They put me to the test and mocked me; *
verses.halfverse: they gnashed at me with their teeth.

verses.verse: O Lord, how long will you look on? *
verses.halfverse: rescue me from the roaring beasts, and my life from the young lions.

verses.verse: I will give you thanks in the great congregation; *
verses.halfverse: I will praise you in the mighty throng.

verses.verse: Do not let my treacherous foes rejoice over me, *
verses.halfverse: nor let those who hate me without a cause wink at each other.

verses.verse: For they do not plan for peace, *
verses.halfverse: but invent deceitful schemes against the quiet in the land.

verses.verse: They opened their mouths at me and said, *
verses.halfverse: "Aha! we saw it with our own eyes."

verses.verse: You saw it, O LORD; do not be silent; *
verses.halfverse: O Lord, be not far from me.

verses.verse: Awake, arise, to my cause! *
verses.halfverse: to my defense, my God and my Lord!

verses.verse: Give me justice, O LORD my God, according to your righteousness; *
verses.halfverse: do not let them triumph over me.

verses.verse: Do not let them say in their hearts, "Aha! just what we want!" *
verses.halfverse: Do not let them say, "We have swallowed him up."

verses.verse: Let all who rejoice at my ruin be ashamed and disgraced; *
verses.halfverse: let those who boast against me be clothed with dismay and shame.

verses.verse: Let those who favor my cause sing out with joy and be glad; *
verses.halfverse: let them say always, "Great is the LORD, who desires the prosperity of his servant."

verses.verse: And my tongue shall be talking of your righteousness *
verses.halfverse: and of your praise all the day long.

verses.verse: There is a voice of rebellion deep in the heart of the wicked; *
verses.halfverse: there is no fear of God before his eyes.

verses.verse: He flatters himself in his own eyes *
verses.halfverse: that his hateful sin will not be found out.

verses.verse: The words of his mouth are wicked and deceitful; *
verses.halfverse: he has left off acting wisely and doing good.

verses.verse: He thinks up wickedness upon his bed and has set himself in no good way; *
verses.halfverse: he does not abhor that which is evil.

verses.verse: Your love, O LORD, reaches to the heavens, *
verses.halfverse: and your faithfulness to the clouds.

verses.verse: Your righteousness is like the strong mountains, your justice like the great deep; *
verses.halfverse: you save both man and beast, O LORD.

verses.verse: How priceless is your love, O God! *
verses.halfverse: your people take refuge under the shadow of your wings.

verses.verse: They feast upon the abundance of your house; *
verses.halfverse: you give them drink from the river of your delights.

verses.verse: For with you is the well of life, *
verses.halfverse: and in your light we see light.

verses.verse: Continue your loving-kindness to those who know you, *
verses.halfverse: and your favor to those who are true of heart.

verses.verse: Let not the foot of the proud come near me, *
verses.halfverse: nor the hand of the wicked push me aside.

verses.verse: See how they are fallen, those who work wickedness! *
verses.halfverse: they are cast down and shall not be able to rise.

verses.verse: Do not fret yourself because of evildoers; *
verses.halfverse: do not be jealous of those who do wrong.

verses.verse: For they shall soon wither like the grass, *
verses.halfverse: and like the green grass fade away.

verses.verse: Put your trust in the LORD and do good; *
verses.halfverse: dwell in the land and feed on its riches.

verses.verse: Take delight in the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and he shall give you your heart's desire.

verses.verse: Commit your way to the LORD and put your trust in him, *
verses.halfverse: and he will bring it to pass.

verses.verse: He will make your righteousness as clear as the light *
verses.halfverse: and your just dealing as the noonday.

verses.verse: Be still before the LORD *
verses.halfverse: and wait patiently for him.

verses.verse: Do not fret yourself over the one who prospers, *
verses.halfverse: the one who succeeds in evil schemes.

verses.verse: Refrain from anger, leave rage alone; *
verses.halfverse: do not fret yourself; it leads only to evil.

verses.verse: For evildoers shall be cut off, *
verses.halfverse: but those who wait upon the LORD shall possess the land.

verses.verse: In a little while the wicked shall be no more; *
verses.halfverse: you shall search out their place, but they will not be there.

verses.verse: But the lowly shall possess the land; *
verses.halfverse: they will delight in abundance of peace.

verses.verse: The wicked plot against the righteous *
verses.halfverse: and gnash at them with their teeth.

verses.verse: The Lord laughs at the wicked, *
verses.halfverse: because he sees that their day will come.

verses.verse: The wicked draw their sword and bend their bow to strike down the poor and needy, *
verses.halfverse: to slaughter those who are upright in their ways.

verses.verse: Their sword shall go through their own heart, *
verses.halfverse: and their bow shall be broken.

verses.verse: The little that the righteous has *
verses.halfverse: is better than great riches of the wicked.

verses.verse: For the power of the wicked shall be broken, *
verses.halfverse: but the LORD upholds the righteous.

verses.verse: The LORD cares for the lives of the godly, *
verses.halfverse: and their inheritance shall last for ever.

verses.verse: They shall not be ashamed in bad times, *
verses.halfverse: and in days of famine they shall have enough.

verses.verse: As for the wicked, they shall perish, *
verses.halfverse: and the enemies of the LORD, like the glory of the meadows, shall vanish; they shall vanish like smoke.

verses.verse: The wicked borrow and do not repay, *
verses.halfverse: but the righteous are generous in giving.

verses.verse: Those who are blessed by God shall possess the land, *
verses.halfverse: but those who are cursed by him shall be destroyed.

verses.verse: Our steps are directed by the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: he strengthens those in whose way he delights.

verses.verse: If they stumble, they shall not fall headlong, *
verses.halfverse: for the LORD holds them by the hand.

verses.verse: I have been young and now I am old, *
verses.halfverse: but never have I seen the righteous forsaken, or their children begging bread.

verses.verse: The righteous are always generous in their lending, *
verses.halfverse: and their children shall be a blessing.

verses.verse: Turn from evil, and do good, *
verses.halfverse: and dwell in the land for ever.

verses.verse: For the LORD loves justice; *
verses.halfverse: he does not forsake his faithful ones.

verses.verse: They shall be kept safe for ever, *
verses.halfverse: but the offspring of the wicked shall be destroyed.

verses.verse: The righteous shall possess the land *
verses.halfverse: and dwell in it for ever.

verses.verse: The mouth of the righteous utters wisdom, *
verses.halfverse: and their tongue speaks what is right.

verses.verse: The law of their God is in their heart, *
verses.halfverse: and their footsteps shall not falter.

verses.verse: The wicked spy on the righteous *
verses.halfverse: and seek occasion to kill them.

verses.verse: The LORD will not abandon them to their hand, *
verses.halfverse: nor let them be found guilty when brought to trial.

verses.verse: Wait upon the LORD and keep his way; *
verses.halfverse: he will raise you up to possess the land, and when the wicked are cut off, you will see it.

verses.verse: I have seen the wicked in their arrogance, *
verses.halfverse: flourishing like a tree in full leaf.

verses.verse: I went by, and behold, they were not there; *
verses.halfverse: I searched for them, but they could not be found.

verses.verse: Mark those who are honest; observe the upright; *
verses.halfverse: for there is a future for the peaceable.

verses.verse: Transgressors shall be destroyed, one and all; *
verses.halfverse: the future of the wicked is cut off.

verses.verse: But the deliverance of the righteous comes from the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: he is their stronghold in time of trouble.

verses.verse: The LORD will help them and rescue them; *
verses.halfverse: he will rescue them from the wicked and deliver them, because they seek refuge in him.

verses.verse: O LORD, do not rebuke me in your anger; *
verses.halfverse: do not punish me in your wrath.

verses.verse: For your arrows have already pierced me, *
verses.halfverse: and your hand presses hard upon me.

verses.verse: There is no health in my flesh, because of your indignation; *
verses.halfverse: there is no soundness in my body, because of my sin.

verses.verse: For my iniquities overwhelm me; *
verses.halfverse: like a heavy burden they are too much for me to bear.

verses.verse: My wounds stink and fester *
verses.halfverse: by reason of my foolishness.

verses.verse: I am utterly bowed down and prostrate; *
verses.halfverse: I go about in mourning all the day long.

verses.verse: My loins are filled with searing pain; *
verses.halfverse: there is no health in my body.

verses.verse: I am utterly numb and crushed; *
verses.halfverse: I wail, because of the groaning of my heart.

verses.verse: O Lord, you know all my desires, *
verses.halfverse: and my sighing is not hidden from you.

verses.verse: My heart is pounding, my strength has failed me, *
verses.halfverse: and the brightness of my eyes is gone from me.

verses.verse: My friends and companions draw back from my affliction; *
verses.halfverse: my neighbors stand afar off.

verses.verse: Those who seek after my life lay snares for me; *
verses.halfverse: those who strive to hurt me speak of my ruin and plot treachery all the day long.

verses.verse: But I am like the deaf who do not hear, *
verses.halfverse: like those who are mute and who do not open their mouth.

verses.verse: I have become like one who does not hear *
verses.halfverse: and from whose mouth comes no defense.

verses.verse: For in you, O LORD, have I fixed my hope; *
verses.halfverse: you will answer me, O Lord my God.

verses.verse: For I said, "Do not let them rejoice at my expense, *
verses.halfverse: those who gloat over me when my foot slips."

verses.verse: Truly, I am on the verge of falling, *
verses.halfverse: and my pain is always with me.

verses.verse: I will confess my iniquity *
verses.halfverse: and be sorry for my sin.

verses.verse: Those who are my enemies without cause are mighty, *
verses.halfverse: and many in number are those who wrongfully hate me.

verses.verse: Those who repay evil for good slander me, *
verses.halfverse: because I follow the course that is right.

verses.verse: O LORD, do not forsake me; *
verses.halfverse: be not far from me, O my God.

verses.verse: Make haste to help me, *
verses.halfverse: O Lord of my salvation.

verses.verse: I said, "I will keep watch upon my ways, *
verses.halfverse: so that I do not offend with my tongue.

verses.verse: I will put a muzzle on my mouth *
verses.halfverse: while the wicked are in my presence."

verses.verse: So I held my tongue and said nothing; *
verses.halfverse: I refrained from rash words; but my pain became unbearable.

verses.verse: My heart was hot within me; while I pondered, the fire burst into flame; *
verses.halfverse: I spoke out with my tongue:

verses.verse: LORD, let me know my end and the number of my days, *
verses.halfverse: so that I may know how short my life is.

verses.verse: You have given me a mere handful of days, and my lifetime is as nothing in your sight; *
verses.halfverse: truly, even those who stand erect are but a puff of wind.

verses.verse: We walk about like a shadow, and in vain we are in turmoil; *
verses.halfverse: we heap up riches and cannot tell who will gather them.

verses.verse: And now, what is my hope? *
verses.halfverse: O Lord, my hope is in you.

verses.verse: Deliver me from all my transgressions *
verses.halfverse: and do not make me the taunt of the fool.

verses.verse: I fell silent and did not open my mouth, *
verses.halfverse: for surely it was you that did it.

verses.verse: Take your affliction from me; *
verses.halfverse: I am worn down by the blows of your hand.

verses.verse: With rebukes for sin you punish us; like a moth you eat away all that is dear to us; *
verses.halfverse: truly, everyone is but a puff of wind.

verses.verse: Hear my prayer, O LORD, and give ear to my cry; *
verses.halfverse: hold not your peace at my tears.

verses.verse: For I am but a sojourner with you, *
verses.halfverse: a wayfarer, as all my forebears were.

verses.verse: Turn your gaze from me, that I may be glad again, *
verses.halfverse: before I go my way and am no more.

verses.verse: I waited patiently upon the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: he stooped to me and heard my cry.

verses.verse: He lifted me out of the desolate pit, out of the mire and clay; *
verses.halfverse: he set my feet upon a high cliff and made my footing sure.

verses.verse: He put a new song in my mouth, a song of praise to our God; *
verses.halfverse: many shall see, and stand in awe, and put their trust in the LORD.

verses.verse: Happy are they who trust in the LORD! *
verses.halfverse: they do not resort to evil spirits or turn to false gods.

verses.verse: Great things are they that you have done, O LORD my God! how great your wonders and your plans for us! *
verses.halfverse: there is none who can be compared with you.

verses.verse: Oh, that I could make them known and tell them! *
verses.halfverse: but they are more than I can count.

verses.verse: In sacrifice and offering you take no pleasure *
verses.halfverse: (you have given me ears to hear you);

verses.verse: Burnt-offering and sin-offering you have not required, *
verses.halfverse: and so I said, "Behold, I come.

verses.verse: In the roll of the book it is written concerning me: *
verses.halfverse: 'I love to do your will, O my God; your law is deep in my heart.'"

verses.verse: I proclaimed righteousness in the great congregation; *
verses.halfverse: behold, I did not restrain my lips; and that, O LORD, you know.

verses.verse: Your righteousness have I not hidden in my heart; I have spoken of your faithfulness and your deliverance; *
verses.halfverse: I have not concealed your love and faithfulness from the great congregation.

verses.verse: You are the LORD; do not withhold your compassion from me; *
verses.halfverse: let your love and your faithfulness keep me safe for ever,

verses.verse: For innumerable troubles have crowded upon me; my sins have overtaken me, and I cannot see; *
verses.halfverse: they are more in number than the hairs of my head, and my heart fails me.

verses.verse: Be pleased, O LORD, to deliver me; *
verses.halfverse: O LORD, make haste to help me.

verses.verse: Let them be ashamed and altogether dismayed who seek after my life to destroy it; *
verses.halfverse: let them draw back and be disgraced who take pleasure in my misfortune.

verses.verse: Let those who say "Aha!" and gloat over me be confounded, *
verses.halfverse: because they are ashamed.

verses.verse: Let all who seek you rejoice in you and be glad; *
verses.halfverse: let those who love your salvation continually say, Great is the LORD!"

verses.verse: Though I am poor and afflicted, *
verses.halfverse: the Lord will have regard for me.

verses.verse: You are my helper and my deliverer; *
verses.halfverse: do not tarry, O my God.

verses.verse: Happy are they who consider the poor and needy! *
verses.halfverse: the LORD will deliver them in the time of trouble.

verses.verse: The LORD preserves them and keeps them alive, so that they may be happy in the land; *
verses.halfverse: he does not hand them over to the will of their enemies.

verses.verse: The LORD sustains them on their sickbed *
verses.halfverse: and ministers to them in their illness.

verses.verse: I said, "LORD, be merciful to me; *
verses.halfverse: heal me, for I have sinned against you."

verses.verse: My enemies are saying wicked things about me: *
verses.halfverse: When will he die, and his name perish?"

verses.verse: Even if they come to see me, they speak empty words; *
verses.halfverse: their heart collects false rumors; they go outside and spread them.

verses.verse: All my enemies whisper together about me *
verses.halfverse: and devise evil against me.

verses.verse: "A deadly thing," they say, "has fastened on him; *
verses.halfverse: he has taken to his bed and will never get up again."

verses.verse: Even my best friend, whom I trusted, who broke bread with me, *
verses.halfverse: has lifted up his heel and turned against me.

verses.verse: But you, O LORD, be merciful to me and raise me up, *
verses.halfverse: and I shall repay them.

verses.verse: By this I know you are pleased with me, *
verses.halfverse: that my enemy does not triumph over me.

verses.verse: In my integrity you hold me fast, *
verses.halfverse: and shall set me before your face for ever.

verses.verse: Blessed be the LORD God of Israel, *
