verses.verse: May you be blessed by the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: the maker of heaven and earth.

verses.verse: The heaven of heavens is the LORD'S, *
verses.halfverse: but he entrusted the earth to its peoples.

verses.verse: The dead do not praise the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: nor all those who go down into silence;

verses.verse: But we will bless the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: from this time forth for evermore. Hallelujah!

verses.verse: I love the LORD, because he has heard the voice of my supplication, *
verses.halfverse: because he has inclined his ear to me whenever I called upon him.

verses.verse: The cords of death entangled me; the grip of the grave took hold of me; *
verses.halfverse: I came to grief and sorrow.

verses.verse: Then I called upon the Name of the LORD: *
verses.halfverse: "O LORD, I pray you, save my life."

verses.verse: Gracious is the LORD and righteous; *
verses.halfverse: our God is full of compassion.

verses.verse: The LORD watches over the innocent; *
verses.halfverse: I was brought very low, and he helped me.

verses.verse: Turn again to your rest, O my soul, *
verses.halfverse: for the LORD has treated you well.

verses.verse: For you have rescued my life from death, *
verses.halfverse: my eyes from tears, and my feet from stumbling.

verses.verse: I will walk in the presence of the LORD *
verses.halfverse: in the land of the living.

verses.verse: I believed, even when I said, "I have been brought very low." *
verses.halfverse: In my distress I said, "No one can be trusted."

verses.verse: How shall I repay the LORD *
verses.halfverse: for all the good things he has done for me?

verses.verse: I will lift up the cup of salvation *
verses.halfverse: and call upon the Name of the LORD.

verses.verse: I will fulfill my vows to the LORD *
verses.halfverse: in the presence of all his people.

verses.verse: Precious in the sight of the LORD *
verses.halfverse: is the death of his servants.

verses.verse: O LORD, I am your servant; *
verses.halfverse: I am your servant and the child of your handmaid; you have freed me from my bonds.

verses.verse: I will offer you the sacrifice of thanksgiving *
verses.halfverse: and call upon the Name of the LORD.

verses.verse: I will fulfill my vows to the LORD *
verses.halfverse: in the presence of all his people,

verses.verse: In the courts of the LORD'S house, *
verses.halfverse: in the midst of you, O Jerusalem. Hallelujah!

verses.verse: Praise the LORD, all you nations; *
verses.halfverse: laud him, all you peoples.

verses.verse: For his loving-kindness toward us is great, *
verses.halfverse: and the faithfulness of the LORD endures for ever. Hallelujah!

verses.verse: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good; *
verses.halfverse: his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: Let Israel now proclaim, *
verses.halfverse: "His mercy endures for ever."

verses.verse: Let the house of Aaron now proclaim, *
verses.halfverse: "His mercy endures for ever."

verses.verse: Let those who fear the LORD now proclaim, *
verses.halfverse: "His mercy endures for ever."

verses.verse: I called to the LORD in my distress; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD answered by setting me free.

verses.verse: The LORD is at my side, therefore I will not fear; *
verses.halfverse: what can anyone do to me?

verses.verse: The LORD is at my side to help me; *
verses.halfverse: I will triumph over those who hate me.

verses.verse: It is better to rely on the LORD *
verses.halfverse: than to put any trust in flesh.

verses.verse: It is better to rely on the LORD *
verses.halfverse: than to put any trust in rulers.

verses.verse: All the ungodly encompass me; *
verses.halfverse: in the Name of the LORD I will repel them.

verses.verse: They hem me in, they hem me in on every side; *
verses.halfverse: in the name of the LORD I will repel them.

verses.verse: They swarm about me like bees; they blaze like a fire of thorns; *
verses.halfverse: in the name of the LORD I will repel them.

verses.verse: I was pressed so hard that I almost fell, *
verses.halfverse: but the LORD came to my help.

verses.verse: The LORD is my strength and my song, *
verses.halfverse: and he has become my salvation.

verses.verse: There is a sound of exultation and victory *
verses.halfverse: in the tents of the righteous:

verses.verse: "The right hand of the LORD has triumphed! *
verses.halfverse: the right hand of the LORD is exalted! the right hand of the LORD has triumphed!"

verses.verse: I shall not die, but live, *
verses.halfverse: and declare the works of the LORD.

verses.verse: The LORD has punished me sorely, *
verses.halfverse: but he did not hand me over to death.

verses.verse: Open for me the gates of righteousness; *
verses.halfverse: I will enter them; I will offer thanks to the LORD.

verses.verse: "This is the gate of the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: he who is righteous may enter."

verses.verse: I will give thanks to you, for you answered me *
verses.halfverse: and have become my salvation.

verses.verse: The same stone which the builders rejected *
verses.halfverse: has become the chief cornerstone.

verses.verse: This is the LORD'S doing, *
verses.halfverse: and it is marvelous in our eyes.

verses.verse: On this day the LORD has acted; *
verses.halfverse: we will rejoice and be glad in it.

verses.verse: Hosanna, LORD, hosanna! *
verses.halfverse: LORD, send us now success.

verses.verse: Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord; *
verses.halfverse: we bless you from the house of the LORD.

verses.verse: God is the LORD; he has shined upon us; *
verses.halfverse: form a procession with branches up to the horns of the altar.

verses.verse: "You are my God, and I will thank you; *
verses.halfverse: you are my God, and I will exalt you."

verses.verse: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good; *
verses.halfverse: his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: Happy are they whose way is blameless, *
verses.halfverse: who walk in the law of the LORD!

verses.verse: Happy are they who observe his decrees *
verses.halfverse: and seek him with all their hearts!

verses.verse: Who never do any wrong, *
verses.halfverse: but always walk in his ways.

verses.verse: You laid down your commandments, *
verses.halfverse: that we should fully keep them.

verses.verse: Oh, that my ways were made so direct *
verses.halfverse: that I might keep your statutes!

verses.verse: Then I should not be put to shame, *
verses.halfverse: when I regard all your commandments.

verses.verse: I will thank you with an unfeigned heart, *
verses.halfverse: when I have learned your righteous judgments.

verses.verse: I will keep your statutes; *
verses.halfverse: do not utterly forsake me.

verses.verse: How shall a young man cleanse his way? *
verses.halfverse: By keeping to your words.

verses.verse: With my whole heart I seek you; *
verses.halfverse: let me not stray from your commandments.

verses.verse: I treasure your promise in my heart, *
verses.halfverse: that I may not sin against you.

verses.verse: Blessed are you, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: instruct me in your statutes.

verses.verse: With my lips will I recite *
verses.halfverse: all the judgments of your mouth.

verses.verse: I have taken greater delight in the way of your decrees *
verses.halfverse: than in all manner of riches.

verses.verse: I will meditate on your commandments *
verses.halfverse: and give attention to your ways.

verses.verse: My delight is in your statutes; *
verses.halfverse: I will not forget your word.

verses.verse: Deal bountifully with your servant, *
verses.halfverse: that I may live and keep your word.

verses.verse: Open my eyes, that I may see *
verses.halfverse: the wonders of your law.

verses.verse: I am a stranger here on earth; *
verses.halfverse: do not hide your commandments from me.

verses.verse: My soul is consumed at all times *
verses.halfverse: with longing for your judgments.

verses.verse: You have rebuked the insolent; *
verses.halfverse: cursed are they who stray from your commandments!

verses.verse: Turn from me shame and rebuke, *
verses.halfverse: for I have kept your decrees.

verses.verse: Even though rulers sit and plot against me, *
verses.halfverse: I will meditate on your statutes.

verses.verse: For your decrees are my delight, *
verses.halfverse: and they are my counselors.

verses.verse: My soul cleaves to the dust; *
verses.halfverse: give me life according to your word.

verses.verse: I have confessed my ways, and you answered me; *
verses.halfverse: instruct me in your statutes.

verses.verse: Make me understand the way of your commandments, *
verses.halfverse: that I may meditate on your marvelous works.

verses.verse: My soul melts away for sorrow; *
verses.halfverse: strengthen me according to your word.

verses.verse: Take from me the way of lying; *
verses.halfverse: let me find grace through your law.

verses.verse: I have chosen the way of faithfulness; *
verses.halfverse: I have set your judgments before me.

verses.verse: I hold fast to your decrees; *
verses.halfverse: O LORD, let me not be put to shame.

verses.verse: I will run the way of your commandments, *
verses.halfverse: for you have set my heart at liberty.

verses.verse: Teach me, O LORD, the way of your statutes, *
verses.halfverse: and I shall keep it to the end.

verses.verse: Give me understanding, and I shall keep your law; *
verses.halfverse: I shall keep it with all my heart.

verses.verse: Make me go in the path of your commandments, *
verses.halfverse: for that is my desire.

verses.verse: Incline my heart to your decrees *
verses.halfverse: and not to unjust gain.

verses.verse: Turn my eyes from watching what is worthless; *
verses.halfverse: give me life in your ways.

verses.verse: Fulfill your promise to your servant, *
verses.halfverse: which you make to those who fear you.

verses.verse: Turn away the reproach which I dread, *
verses.halfverse: because your judgments are good.

verses.verse: Behold, I long for your commandments; *
verses.halfverse: in your righteousness preserve my life.

verses.verse: Let your loving-kindness come to me, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and your salvation, according to your promise.

verses.verse: Then shall I have a word for those who taunt me, *
verses.halfverse: because I trust in your words.

verses.verse: Do not take the word of truth out of my mouth, *
verses.halfverse: for my hope is in your judgments.

verses.verse: I shall continue to keep your law; *
verses.halfverse: I shall keep it for ever and ever.

verses.verse: I will walk at liberty, *
verses.halfverse: because I study your commandments.

verses.verse: I will tell of your decrees before kings *
verses.halfverse: and will not be ashamed.

verses.verse: I delight in your commandments, *
verses.halfverse: which I have always loved.

verses.verse: I will lift up my hands to your commandments, *
verses.halfverse: and I will meditate on your statutes.

verses.verse: Remember your word to your servant, *
verses.halfverse: because you have given me hope.

verses.verse: This is my comfort in my trouble, *
verses.halfverse: that your promise gives me life.

verses.verse: The proud have derided me cruelly, *
verses.halfverse: but I have not turned from your law.

verses.verse: When I remember your judgments of old, *
verses.halfverse: O LORD, I take great comfort.

verses.verse: I am filled with a burning rage, *
verses.halfverse: because of the wicked who forsake your law.

verses.verse: Your statutes have been like songs to me *
verses.halfverse: wherever I have lived as a stranger.

verses.verse: I remember your Name in the night, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and dwell upon your law.

verses.verse: This is how it has been with me, *
verses.halfverse: because I have kept your commandments.

verses.verse: You only are my portion, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: I have promised to keep your words.

verses.verse: I entreat you with all my heart, *
verses.halfverse: be merciful to me according to your promise.

verses.verse: I have considered my ways *
verses.halfverse: and turned my feet toward your decrees.

verses.verse: I hasten and do not tarry *
verses.halfverse: to keep your commandments.

verses.verse: Though the cords of the wicked entangle me, *
verses.halfverse: I do not forget your law.

verses.verse: At midnight I will rise to give you thanks, *
verses.halfverse: because of your righteous judgments.

verses.verse: I am a companion of all who fear you *
verses.halfverse: and of those who keep your commandments.

verses.verse: The earth, O LORD, is full of your love; *
verses.halfverse: instruct me in your statutes.

verses.verse: O LORD, you have dealt graciously with your servant, *
verses.halfverse: according to your word.

verses.verse: Teach me discernment and knowledge, *
verses.halfverse: for I have believed in your commandments.

verses.verse: Before I was afflicted I went astray, *
verses.halfverse: but now I keep your word.

verses.verse: You are good and you bring forth good; *
verses.halfverse: instruct me in your statutes.

verses.verse: The proud have smeared me with lies, *
verses.halfverse: but I will keep your commandments with my whole heart.

verses.verse: Their heart is gross and fat, *
verses.halfverse: but my delight is in your law.

verses.verse: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, *
verses.halfverse: that I might learn your statutes.

verses.verse: The law of your mouth is dearer to me *
verses.halfverse: than thousands in gold and silver.

verses.verse: Your hands have made me and fashioned me; *
verses.halfverse: give me understanding, that I may learn your commandments.

verses.verse: Those who fear you will be glad when they see me, *
verses.halfverse: because I trust in your word.

verses.verse: I know, O LORD, that your judgments are right *
verses.halfverse: and that in faithfulness you have afflicted me.

verses.verse: Let your loving-kindness be my comfort, *
verses.halfverse: as you have promised to your servant.

verses.verse: Let your compassion come to me, that I may live, *
verses.halfverse: for your law is my delight.

verses.verse: Let the arrogant be put to shame, for they wrong me with lies; *
verses.halfverse: but I will meditate on your commandments.

verses.verse: Let those who fear you turn to me, *
verses.halfverse: and also those who know your decrees.

verses.verse: Let my heart be sound in your statutes, *
verses.halfverse: that I may not be put to shame.

verses.verse: My soul has longed for your salvation; *
verses.halfverse: I have put my hope in your word.

verses.verse: My eyes have failed from watching for your promise, *
verses.halfverse: and I say, "When will you comfort me?"

verses.verse: I have become like a leather flask in the smoke, *
verses.halfverse: but I have not forgotten your statutes.

verses.verse: How much longer must I wait? *
verses.halfverse: when will you give judgment against those who persecute me?

verses.verse: The proud have dug pits for me; *
verses.halfverse: they do not keep your law.

verses.verse: All your commandments are true; *
verses.halfverse: help me, for they persecute me with lies.

verses.verse: They had almost made an end of me on earth, *
verses.halfverse: but I have not forsaken your commandments.

verses.verse: In your loving-kindness, revive me, *
verses.halfverse: that I may keep the decrees of your mouth.

verses.verse: O LORD, your word is everlasting; *
verses.halfverse: it stands firm in the heavens.

verses.verse: Your faithfulness remains from one generation to another; *
verses.halfverse: you established the earth, and it abides.

verses.verse: By your decree these continue to this day, *
verses.halfverse: for all things are your servants.

verses.verse: If my delight had not been in your law, *
verses.halfverse: I should have perished in my affliction.

verses.verse: I will never forget your commandments, *
verses.halfverse: because by them you give me life.

verses.verse: I am yours; oh, that you would save me! *
verses.halfverse: for I study your commandments.

verses.verse: Though the wicked lie in wait for me to destroy me, *
verses.halfverse: I will apply my mind to your decrees.

verses.verse: I see that all things come to an end, *
verses.halfverse: but your commandment has no bounds.

verses.verse: Oh, how I love your law! *
verses.halfverse: all the day long it is in my mind.

verses.verse: Your commandment has made me wiser than my enemies, *
verses.halfverse: and it is always with me.

verses.verse: I have more understanding than all my teachers, *
verses.halfverse: for your decrees are my study.

verses.verse: I am wiser than the elders, *
verses.halfverse: because I observe your commandments.

verses.verse: I restrain my feet from every evil way, *
verses.halfverse: that I may keep your word.

verses.verse: I do not shrink from your judgments, *
verses.halfverse: because you yourself have taught me.

verses.verse: How sweet are your words to my taste! *
verses.halfverse: they are sweeter than honey to my mouth.

verses.verse: Through your commandments I gain understanding; *
verses.halfverse: therefore I hate every lying way.

verses.verse: Your word is a lantern to my feet *
verses.halfverse: and a light upon my path.

verses.verse: I have sworn and am determined *
verses.halfverse: to keep your righteous judgments.

verses.verse: I am deeply troubled; *
verses.halfverse: preserve my life, O LORD, according to your word.

verses.verse: Accept, O LORD, the willing tribute of my lips, *
verses.halfverse: and teach me your judgments.

verses.verse: My life is always in my hand, *
verses.halfverse: yet I do not forget your law.

verses.verse: The wicked have set a trap for me, *
verses.halfverse: but I have not strayed from your commandments.

verses.verse: Your decrees are my inheritance for ever; *
verses.halfverse: truly, they are the joy of my heart.

verses.verse: I have applied my heart to fulfill your statutes *
verses.halfverse: for ever and to the end.

verses.verse: I hate those who have a divided heart, *
verses.halfverse: but your law do I love.

verses.verse: You are my refuge and shield; *
verses.halfverse: my hope is in your word.

verses.verse: Away from me, you wicked! *
verses.halfverse: I will keep the commandments of my God.

verses.verse: Sustain me according to your promise, that I may live, *
verses.halfverse: and let me not be disappointed in my hope.

verses.verse: Hold me up, and I shall be safe, *
verses.halfverse: and my delight shall be ever in your statutes.

verses.verse: You spurn all who stray from your statutes; *
verses.halfverse: their deceitfulness is in vain.

verses.verse: In your sight all the wicked of the earth are but dross; *
verses.halfverse: therefore I love your decrees.

verses.verse: My flesh trembles with dread of you; *
verses.halfverse: I am afraid of your judgments.

verses.verse: I have done what is just and right; *
verses.halfverse: do not deliver me to my oppressors.

verses.verse: Be surety for your servant's good; *
verses.halfverse: let not the proud oppress me.

verses.verse: My eyes have failed from watching for your salvation *
verses.halfverse: and for your righteous promise.

verses.verse: Deal with your servant according to your loving-kindness *
verses.halfverse: and teach me your statutes.

verses.verse: I am your servant; grant me understanding, *
verses.halfverse: that I may know your decrees.

verses.verse: It is time for you to act, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: for they have broken your law.

verses.verse: Truly, I love your commandments *
verses.halfverse: more than gold and precious stones.

verses.verse: I hold all your commandments to be right for me; *
verses.halfverse: all paths of falsehood I abhor.

verses.verse: Your decrees are wonderful; *
verses.halfverse: therefore I obey them with all my heart.

verses.verse: When your word goes forth it gives light; *
verses.halfverse: it gives understanding to the simple.

verses.verse: I open my mouth and pant; *
verses.halfverse: I long for your commandments.

verses.verse: Turn to me in mercy, *
verses.halfverse: as you always do to those who love your Name.

verses.verse: Steady my footsteps in your word; *
verses.halfverse: let no iniquity have dominion over me.

verses.verse: Rescue me from those who oppress me, *
verses.halfverse: and I will keep your commandments.

verses.verse: Let your countenance shine upon your servant *
verses.halfverse: and teach me your statutes.

verses.verse: My eyes shed streams of tears, *
verses.halfverse: because people do not keep your law.

verses.verse: You are righteous, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and upright are your judgments.

verses.verse: You have issued your decrees *
verses.halfverse: with justice and in perfect faithfulness.

verses.verse: My indignation has consumed me, *
verses.halfverse: because my enemies forget your words.

verses.verse: Your word has been tested to the uttermost, *
verses.halfverse: and your servant holds it dear.

verses.verse: I am small and of little account, *
verses.halfverse: yet I do not forget your commandments.

verses.verse: Your justice is an everlasting justice *
verses.halfverse: and your law is the truth.

verses.verse: Trouble and distress have come upon me, *
verses.halfverse: yet your commandments are my delight.

verses.verse: The righteousness of your decrees is everlasting; *
verses.halfverse: grant me understanding, that I may live.

verses.verse: I call with my whole heart; *
verses.halfverse: answer me, O LORD, that I may keep your statutes.

verses.verse: I call to you; oh, that you would save me! *
verses.halfverse: I will keep your decrees.

verses.verse: Early in the morning I cry out to you, *
verses.halfverse: for in your word is my trust.

verses.verse: My eyes are open in the night watches, *
verses.halfverse: that I may meditate upon your promise.

verses.verse: Hear my voice, O LORD, according to your loving-kindness; *
verses.halfverse: according to your judgments, give me life.

verses.verse: They draw near who in malice persecute me; *
verses.halfverse: they are very far from your law.

verses.verse: You, O LORD, are near at hand, *
verses.halfverse: and all your commandments are true.

verses.verse: Long have I known from your decrees *
verses.halfverse: that you have established them for ever.

verses.verse: Behold my affliction and deliver me, *
verses.halfverse: for I do not forget your law.

verses.verse: Plead my cause and redeem me; *
verses.halfverse: according to your promise, give me life.

verses.verse: Deliverance is far from the wicked, *
verses.halfverse: for they do not study your statutes.

verses.verse: Great is your compassion, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: preserve my life, according to your judgments.

verses.verse: There are many who persecute and oppress me, *
verses.halfverse: yet I have not swerved from your decrees.

verses.verse: I look with loathing at the faithless, *
verses.halfverse: for they have not kept your word.

verses.verse: See how I love your commandments! *
verses.halfverse: O LORD, in your mercy, preserve me.

verses.verse: The heart of your word is truth; *
verses.halfverse: all your righteous judgments endure for evermore.

verses.verse: Rulers have persecuted me without a cause, *
verses.halfverse: but my heart stands in awe of your word.

verses.verse: I am as glad because of your promise *
verses.halfverse: as one who finds great spoils.

verses.verse: As for lies, I hate and abhor them, *
verses.halfverse: but your law is my love.

verses.verse: Seven times a day do I praise you, *
verses.halfverse: because of your righteous judgments.

verses.verse: Great peace have they who love your law; *
verses.halfverse: for them there is no stumbling block.

verses.verse: I have hoped for your salvation, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and have fulfilled your commandments.

verses.verse: I have kept your decrees *
verses.halfverse: and I have loved them deeply.

verses.verse: I have kept your commandments and decrees, *
verses.halfverse: for all my ways are before you.

verses.verse: Let my cry come before you, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: give me understanding, according to your word.

verses.verse: Let my supplication come before you; *
verses.halfverse: deliver me, according to your promise.

verses.verse: My lips shall pour forth your praise, *
verses.halfverse: when you teach me your statutes.

verses.verse: My tongue shall sing of your promise, *
verses.halfverse: for all your commandments are righteous.

verses.verse: Let your hand be ready to help me, *
verses.halfverse: for I have chosen your commandments.

verses.verse: I long for your salvation, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and your law is my delight.

verses.verse: Let me live, and I will praise you, *
verses.halfverse: and let your judgments help me.

verses.verse: I have gone astray like a sheep that is lost; *
verses.halfverse: search for your servant, for I do not forget your commandments.

verses.verse: When I was in trouble, I called to the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: I called to the LORD, and he answered me.

verses.verse: Deliver me, O LORD, from lying lips *
verses.halfverse: and from the deceitful tongue.

verses.verse: What shall be done to you, and what more besides, *
verses.halfverse: O you deceitful tongue?

verses.verse: The sharpened arrows of a warrior, *
verses.halfverse: along with hot glowing coals.

verses.verse: How hateful it is that I must lodge in Meshech *
verses.halfverse: and dwell among the tents of Kedar!

verses.verse: Too long have I had to live *
verses.halfverse: among the enemies of peace.

verses.verse: I am on the side of peace, *
verses.halfverse: but when I speak of it, they are for war.

verses.verse: I lift up my eyes to the hills; *
verses.halfverse: from where is my help to come?

verses.verse: My help comes from the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: the maker of heaven and earth.

verses.verse: He will not let your foot be moved *
verses.halfverse: and he who watches over you will not fall asleep.

verses.verse: Behold, he who keeps watch over Israel *
verses.halfverse: shall neither slumber nor sleep;

verses.verse: The LORD himself watches over you; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD is your shade at your right hand,

verses.verse: So that the sun shall not strike you by day, *
verses.halfverse: nor the moon by night.

verses.verse: The LORD shall preserve you from all evil; *
verses.halfverse: it is he who shall keep you safe.

verses.verse: The LORD shall watch over your going out and your coming in, *
verses.halfverse: from this time forth for evermore.

verses.verse: I was glad when they said to me, *
verses.halfverse: "Let us go to the house of the LORD."

verses.verse: Now our feet are standing *
verses.halfverse: within your gates, O Jerusalem.

verses.verse: Jerusalem is built as a city *
verses.halfverse: that is at unity with itself;

verses.verse: To which the tribes go up, the tribes of the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: the assembly of Israel, to praise the Name of the LORD.

verses.verse: For there are the thrones of judgment, *
verses.halfverse: the thrones of the house of David.

verses.verse: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: *
verses.halfverse: "May they prosper who love you.

verses.verse: Peace be within your walls *
verses.halfverse: and quietness within your towers.

verses.verse: For my brethren and companions' sake, *
verses.halfverse: I pray for your prosperity.

verses.verse: Because of the house of the LORD our God, *
verses.halfverse: I will seek to do you good."

verses.verse: To you I lift up my eyes, *
verses.halfverse: to you enthroned in the heavens.

verses.verse: As the eyes of servants look to the hand of their masters, *
verses.halfverse: and the eyes of a maid to the hand of her mistress,

verses.verse: So our eyes look to the LORD our God, *
verses.halfverse: until he show us his mercy.

verses.verse: Have mercy upon us, O LORD, have mercy, *
verses.halfverse: for we have had more than enough of contempt,

verses.verse: Too much of the scorn of the indolent rich, *
verses.halfverse: and of the derision of the proud.

verses.verse: If the LORD had not been on our side, *
verses.halfverse: let Israel now say;

verses.verse: If the LORD had not been on our side, *
verses.halfverse: when enemies rose up against us;

verses.verse: Then would they have swallowed us up alive *
verses.halfverse: in their fierce anger toward us;

verses.verse: Then would the waters have overwhelmed us *
verses.halfverse: and the torrent gone over us;

verses.verse: Then would the raging waters *
verses.halfverse: have gone right over us.

verses.verse: Blessed be the LORD! *
verses.halfverse: he has not given us over to be a prey for their teeth.

verses.verse: We have escaped like a bird from the snare of the fowler; *
verses.halfverse: the snare is broken, and we have escaped.

verses.verse: Our help is in the Name of the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: the maker of heaven and earth.

verses.verse: Those who trust in the LORD are like Mount Zion, *
verses.halfverse: which cannot be moved, but stands fast for ever.

verses.verse: The hills stand about Jerusalem; *
verses.halfverse: so does the LORD stand round about his people, from this time forth for evermore.

verses.verse: The scepter of the wicked shall not hold sway over the land allotted to the just, *
verses.halfverse: so that the just shall not put their hands to evil.

verses.verse: Show your goodness, O LORD, to those who are good *
verses.halfverse: and to those who are true of heart.

verses.verse: As for those who turn aside to crooked ways, the LORD will lead them away with the evildoers; *
verses.halfverse: but peace be upon Israel.

verses.verse: When the LORD restored the fortunes of Zion, *
verses.halfverse: then were we like those who dream.

verses.verse: Then was our mouth filled with laughter, *
verses.halfverse: and our tongue with shouts of joy.

verses.verse: Then they said among the nations, *
verses.halfverse: "The LORD has done great things for them."

verses.verse: The LORD has done great things for us, *
verses.halfverse: and we are glad indeed.

verses.verse: Restore our fortunes, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: like the watercourses of the Negev.

verses.verse: Those who sowed with tears *
verses.halfverse: will reap with songs of joy.

verses.verse: Those who go out weeping, carrying the seed, *
verses.halfverse: will come again with joy, shouldering their sheaves.

verses.verse: Unless the LORD builds the house, *
verses.halfverse: their labor is in vain who build it.

verses.verse: Unless the LORD watches over the city, *
verses.halfverse: in vain the watchman keeps his vigil.

verses.verse: It is in vain that you rise so early and go to bed so late; *
verses.halfverse: vain, too, to eat the bread of toil, for he gives to his beloved sleep.

verses.verse: Children are a heritage from the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and the fruit of the womb is a gift.

verses.verse: Like arrows in the hand of a warrior *
verses.halfverse: are the children of one's youth.

verses.verse: Happy is the man who has his quiver full of them! *
verses.halfverse: he shall not be put to shame when he contends with his enemies in the gate.

verses.verse: Happy are they all who fear the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and who follow in his ways!

verses.verse: You shall eat the fruit of your labor; *
verses.halfverse: happiness and prosperity shall be yours.

verses.verse: Your wife shall be like a fruitful vine within your house, *
verses.halfverse: your children like olive shoots round about your table.

verses.verse: The man who fears the LORD *
verses.halfverse: shall thus indeed be blessed.

verses.verse: The LORD bless you from Zion, *
verses.halfverse: and may you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life.

verses.verse: May you live to see your children's children; *
verses.halfverse: may peace be upon Israel.

verses.verse: "Greatly have they oppressed me since my youth," *
verses.halfverse: let Israel now say;

verses.verse: "Greatly have they oppressed me since my youth, *
verses.halfverse: but they have not prevailed against me."

verses.verse: The plowmen plowed upon my back *
verses.halfverse: and made their furrows long.

verses.verse: The LORD, the Righteous One, *
verses.halfverse: has cut the cords of the wicked.

verses.verse: Let them be put to shame and thrown back, *
verses.halfverse: all those who are enemies of Zion.

verses.verse: Let them be like grass upon the housetops, *
verses.halfverse: which withers before it can be plucked;

verses.verse: Which does not fill the hand of the reaper, *
verses.halfverse: nor the bosom of him who binds the sheaves;

verses.verse: So that those who go by say not so much as, "The LORD prosper you. *
verses.halfverse: We wish you well in the Name of the LORD."

verses.verse: Out of the depths have I called to you, O LORD; LORD, hear my voice; *
verses.halfverse: let your ears consider well the voice of my supplication.

verses.verse: If you, LORD, were to note what is done amiss, *
verses.halfverse: O LORD, who could stand?

verses.verse: For there is forgiveness with you; *
verses.halfverse: therefore you shall be feared.

verses.verse: I wait for the LORD; my soul waits for him; *
verses.halfverse: in his word is my hope.

verses.verse: My soul waits for the LORD, more than watchmen for the morning, *
verses.halfverse: more than watchmen for the morning.

verses.verse: O Israel, wait for the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: for with the LORD there is mercy;

verses.verse: With him there is plenteous redemption, *
verses.halfverse: and he shall redeem Israel from all their sins.

verses.verse: O LORD, I am not proud; *
verses.halfverse: I have no haughty looks.

verses.verse: I do not occupy myself with great matters, *
verses.halfverse: or with things that are too hard for me.

verses.verse: But I still my soul and make it quiet, like a child upon its mother's breast; *
verses.halfverse: my soul is quieted within me.

verses.verse: O Israel, wait upon the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: from this time forth for evermore.

verses.verse: LORD, remember David, *
verses.halfverse: and all the hardships he endured;

verses.verse: How he swore an oath to the LORD *
verses.halfverse: and vowed a vow to the Mighty One of Jacob:

verses.verse: "I will not come under the roof of my house, *
verses.halfverse: nor climb up into my bed;

verses.verse: I will not allow my eyes to sleep, *
verses.halfverse: nor let my eyelids slumber;

verses.verse: Until I find a place for the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: a dwelling for the Mighty One of Jacob."

verses.verse: "The ark! We heard it was in Ephratah; *
verses.halfverse: we found it in the fields of Jearim.

verses.verse: Let us go to God's dwelling place; *
verses.halfverse: let us fall upon our knees before his footstool."

verses.verse: Arise, O LORD, into your resting-place, *
verses.halfverse: you and the ark of your strength.

verses.verse: Let your priests be clothed with righteousness; *
verses.halfverse: let your faithful people sing with joy.

verses.verse: For your servant David's sake, *
verses.halfverse: do not turn away the face of your Anointed.

verses.verse: The LORD has sworn an oath to David; *
verses.halfverse: in truth, he will not break it:

verses.verse: "A son, the fruit of your body *
verses.halfverse: will I set upon your throne.

verses.verse: If your children keep my covenant and my testimonies that I shall teach them, *
verses.halfverse: their children will sit upon your throne for evermore."

verses.verse: For the LORD has chosen Zion; *
verses.halfverse: he has desired her for his habitation:

verses.verse: "This shall be my resting-place for ever; *
verses.halfverse: here will I dwell, for I delight in her.

verses.verse: I will surely bless her provisions, *
verses.halfverse: and satisfy her poor with bread.

verses.verse: I will clothe her priests with salvation, *
verses.halfverse: and her faithful people will rejoice and sing.

verses.verse: There will I make the horn of David flourish; *
verses.halfverse: I have prepared a lamp for my Anointed.

verses.verse: As for his enemies, I will clothe them with shame; *
verses.halfverse: but as for him, his crown will shine."

verses.verse: Oh, how good and pleasant it is, *
verses.halfverse: when brethren live together in unity!

verses.verse: It is like fine oil upon the head *
verses.halfverse: that runs down upon the beard,

verses.verse: Upon the beard of Aaron, *
verses.halfverse: and runs down upon the collar of his robe.

verses.verse: It is like the dew of Hermon *
verses.halfverse: that falls upon the hills of Zion.

verses.verse: For there the LORD has ordained the blessing: *
verses.halfverse: life for evermore.

verses.verse: Behold now, bless the LORD, all you servants of the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: you that stand by night in the house of the LORD.

verses.verse: Lift up your hands in the holy place and bless the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD who made heaven and earth bless you out of Zion.

verses.verse: Hallelujah! Praise the Name of the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: give praise, you servants of the LORD.

verses.verse: You who stand in the house of the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: in the courts of the house of our God.

verses.verse: Praise the LORD, for the LORD is good; *
verses.halfverse: sing praises to his Name, for it is lovely.

verses.verse: For the LORD has chosen Jacob for himself *
verses.halfverse: and Israel for his own possession.

verses.verse: For I know that the LORD is great, *
verses.halfverse: and that our Lord is above all gods.

verses.verse: The LORD does whatever pleases him, in heaven and on earth, *
verses.halfverse: in the seas and all the deeps.

verses.verse: He brings up rain clouds from the ends of the earth; *
verses.halfverse: he sends out lightning with the rain, and brings the winds out of his storehouse.

verses.verse: It was he who struck down the firstborn of Egypt, *
verses.halfverse: the firstborn both of man and beast.

verses.verse: He sent signs and wonders into the midst of you, O Egypt, *
verses.halfverse: against Pharaoh and all his servants.

verses.verse: He overthrew many nations *
verses.halfverse: and put mighty kings to death:

verses.verse: Sihon, king of the Amorites, and Og, the king of Bashan, *
verses.halfverse: and all the kingdoms of Canaan.

verses.verse: He gave their land to be an inheritance, *
verses.halfverse: an inheritance for Israel his people.

verses.verse: O LORD, your Name is everlasting; *
verses.halfverse: your renown, O LORD, endures from age to age.

verses.verse: For the LORD gives his people justice *
verses.halfverse: and shows compassion to his servants.

verses.verse: The idols of the heathen are silver and gold, *
verses.halfverse: the work of human hands.

verses.verse: They have mouths, but they cannot speak; *
verses.halfverse: eyes have they, but they cannot see.

verses.verse: They have ears, but they cannot hear; *
verses.halfverse: neither is there any breath in their mouth.

verses.verse: Those who make them are like them, *
verses.halfverse: and so are all who put their trust in them.

verses.verse: Bless the LORD, O house of Israel; *
verses.halfverse: O house of Aaron, bless the LORD.

verses.verse: Bless the LORD, O house of Levi; *
verses.halfverse: you who fear the LORD, bless the LORD.

verses.verse: Blessed be the LORD out of Zion, *
verses.halfverse: who dwells in Jerusalem. Hallelujah!

verses.verse: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: Give thanks to the God of gods, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: Give thanks to the Lord of lords, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: Who only does great wonders, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: Who by wisdom made the heavens, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: Who spread out the earth upon the waters, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: Who created great lights, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: The sun to rule the day, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: The moon and the stars to govern the night, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: Who struck down the firstborn of Egypt, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: And brought out Israel from among them, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: With a mighty hand and a stretched-out arm, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: Who divided the Red Sea in two, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: And made Israel to pass through the midst of it, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: But swept Pharaoh and his army into the Red Sea, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: Who led his people through the wilderness, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: Who struck down great kings, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: And slew mighty kings, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: Sihon, king of the Amorites, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: And Og, the king of Bashan, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: And gave away their lands for an inheritance, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: An inheritance for Israel his servant, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: Who remembered us in our low estate, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: And delivered us from our enemies, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever;

verses.verse: Who gives food to all creatures, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: Give thanks to the God of heaven, *
verses.halfverse: for his mercy endures for ever.

verses.verse: By the waters of Babylon we sat down and wept, *
verses.halfverse: when we remembered you, O Zion.

verses.verse: As for our harps, we hung them up *
verses.halfverse: on the trees in the midst of that land.

verses.verse: For those who led us away captive asked us for a song, and our oppressors called for mirth: *
verses.halfverse: "Sing us one of the songs of Zion."

verses.verse: How shall we sing the LORD'S song *
verses.halfverse: upon an alien soil?

verses.verse: If I forget you, O Jerusalem, *
verses.halfverse: let my right hand forget its skill.

verses.verse: Let my tongue cleave to the roof of my mouth if I do not remember you, *
verses.halfverse: if I do not set Jerusalem above my highest joy.

verses.verse: Remember the day of Jerusalem, O LORD, against the people of Edom, *
verses.halfverse: who said, "Down with it! down with it! even to the ground!"

verses.verse: O Daughter of Babylon, doomed to destruction, *
verses.halfverse: happy the one who pays you back for what you have done to us!

verses.verse: Happy shall he be who takes your little ones, *
verses.halfverse: and dashes them against the rock!

verses.verse: I will give thanks to you, O LORD, with my whole heart; *
verses.halfverse: before the gods I will sing your praise.

verses.verse: I will bow down toward your holy temple and praise your Name, *
verses.halfverse: because of your love and faithfulness;

verses.verse: For you have glorified your Name *
verses.halfverse: and your word above all things.

verses.verse: When I called, you answered me; *
verses.halfverse: you increased my strength within me.

verses.verse: All the kings of the earth will praise you, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: when they have heard the words of your mouth.

verses.verse: They will sing of the ways of the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: that great is the glory of the LORD.

verses.verse: Though the LORD be high, he cares for the lowly; *
verses.halfverse: he perceives the haughty from afar.

verses.verse: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, you keep me safe; *
verses.halfverse: you stretch forth your hand against the fury of my enemies; your right hand shall save me.

verses.verse: The LORD will make good his purpose for me; *
verses.halfverse: O LORD, your love endures for ever; do not abandon the works of your hands.

verses.verse: LORD, you have searched me out and known me; *
verses.halfverse: you know my sitting down and my rising up; you discern my thoughts from afar.

verses.verse: You trace my journeys and my resting-places *
verses.halfverse: and are acquainted with all my ways.

verses.verse: Indeed, there is not a word on my lips, *
verses.halfverse: but you, O LORD, know it altogether.

verses.verse: You press upon me behind and before *
verses.halfverse: and lay your hand upon me.

verses.verse: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me; *
verses.halfverse: it is so high that I cannot attain to it.

verses.verse: Where can I go then from your Spirit? *
verses.halfverse: where can I flee from your presence?

verses.verse: If I climb up to heaven, you are there; *
verses.halfverse: if I make the grave my bed, you are there also.

verses.verse: If I take the wings of the morning *
verses.halfverse: and dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea,

verses.verse: Even there your hand will lead me *
verses.halfverse: and your right hand hold me fast.

verses.verse: If I say, "Surely the darkness will cover me, *
verses.halfverse: and the light around me turn to night,"

verses.verse: Darkness is not dark to you; the night is as bright as the day; *
verses.halfverse: darkness and light to you are both alike.

verses.verse: For you yourself created my inmost parts; *
verses.halfverse: you knit me together in my mother's womb.

verses.verse: I will thank you because I am marvelously made; *
verses.halfverse: your works are wonderful, and I know it well.

verses.verse: My body was not hidden from you, *
verses.halfverse: while I was being made in secret and woven in the depths of the earth.

verses.verse: Your eyes beheld my limbs, yet unfinished in the womb; all of them were written in your book; *
verses.halfverse: they were fashioned day by day, when as yet there was none of them.

verses.verse: How deep I find your thoughts, O God! *
verses.halfverse: how great is the sum of them!

verses.verse: If I were to count them, they would be more in number than the sand; *
verses.halfverse: to count them all, my life span would need to be like yours.

verses.verse: Oh, that you would slay the wicked, O God! *
verses.halfverse: You that thirst for blood, depart from me.

verses.verse: They speak despitefully against you; *
verses.halfverse: your enemies take your Name in vain.

verses.verse: Do I not hate those, O LORD, who hate you? *
verses.halfverse: and do I not loathe those who rise up against you?

verses.verse: I hate them with a perfect hatred; *
verses.halfverse: they have become my own enemies.

verses.verse: Search me out, O God, and know my heart; *
verses.halfverse: try me and know my restless thoughts.

verses.verse: Look well whether there be any wickedness in me *
verses.halfverse: and lead me in the way that is everlasting.

verses.verse: Deliver me, O LORD, from evildoers; *
verses.halfverse: protect me from the violent,

verses.verse: Who devise evil in their hearts *
verses.halfverse: and stir up strife all day long.

verses.verse: They have sharpened their tongues like a serpent; *
verses.halfverse: adder's poison is under their lips.

verses.verse: Keep me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked; *
verses.halfverse: protect me from the violent, who are determined to trip me up.

verses.verse: The proud have hidden a snare for me and stretched out a net of cords; *
verses.halfverse: they have set traps for me along the path.

verses.verse: I have said to the LORD, "You are my God; *
verses.halfverse: listen, O LORD, to my supplication.

verses.verse: O Lord GOD, the strength of my salvation, *
verses.halfverse: you have covered my head in the day of battle.

verses.verse: Do not grant the desires of the wicked, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: nor let their evil plans prosper.

verses.verse: Let not those who surround me lift up their heads; *
verses.halfverse: let the evil of their lips overwhelm them.

verses.verse: Let hot burning coals fall upon them; *
verses.halfverse: let them be cast into the mire, never to rise up again."

verses.verse: A slanderer shall not be established on the earth, *
verses.halfverse: and evil shall hunt down the lawless.

verses.verse: I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the poor *
verses.halfverse: and render justice to the needy.

verses.verse: Surely, the righteous will give thanks to your Name, *
verses.halfverse: and the upright shall continue in your sight.

verses.verse: O LORD, I call to you; come to me quickly; *
verses.halfverse: hear my voice when I cry to you.

verses.verse: Let my prayer be set forth in your sight as incense, *
verses.halfverse: the lifting up of my hands as the evening sacrifice.

verses.verse: Set a watch before my mouth, O LORD, and guard the door of my lips; *
verses.halfverse: let not my heart incline to any evil thing.

verses.verse: Let me not be occupied in wickedness with evildoers, *
verses.halfverse: nor eat of their choice foods.

verses.verse: Let the righteous smite me in friendly rebuke; let not the oil of the unrighteous anoint my head; *
verses.halfverse: for my prayer is continually against their wicked deeds.

verses.verse: Let their rulers be overthrown in stony places, *
verses.halfverse: that they may know my words are true.

verses.verse: As when a plowman turns over the earth in furrows, *
verses.halfverse: let their bones be scattered at the mouth of the grave.

verses.verse: But my eyes are turned to you, Lord GOD; *
verses.halfverse: in you I take refuge; do not strip me of my life.

verses.verse: Protect me from the snare which they have laid for me *
verses.halfverse: and from the traps of the evildoers.

verses.verse: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, *
verses.halfverse: while I myself escape.

verses.verse: I cry to the LORD with my voice; *
verses.halfverse: to the LORD I make loud supplication.

verses.verse: I pour out my complaint before him *
verses.halfverse: and tell him all my trouble.

verses.verse: When my spirit languishes within me, you know my path; *
verses.halfverse: in the way wherein I walk they have hidden a trap for me.

verses.verse: I look to my right hand and find no one who knows me; *
verses.halfverse: I have no place to flee to, and no one cares for me.

verses.verse: I cry out to you, O LORD; *
verses.halfverse: I say, "You are my refuge, my portion in the land of the living."

verses.verse: Listen to my cry for help, for I have been brought very low; *
verses.halfverse: save me from those who pursue me, for they are too strong for me.

verses.verse: Bring me out of prison, that I may give thanks to your Name; *
verses.halfverse: when you have dealt bountifully with me, the righteous will gather around me.

verses.verse: LORD, hear my prayer, and in your faithfulness heed my supplications; *
verses.halfverse: answer me in your righteousness.

verses.verse: Enter not into judgment with your servant, *
verses.halfverse: for in your sight shall no one living be justified.

verses.verse: For my enemy has sought my life; he has crushed me to the ground; *
verses.halfverse: he has made me live in dark places like those who are long dead.

verses.verse: My spirit faints within me; *
verses.halfverse: my heart within me is desolate.

verses.verse: I remember the time past; I muse upon all your deeds; *
verses.halfverse: I consider the works of your hands.

verses.verse: I spread out my hands to you; *
verses.halfverse: my soul gasps to you like a thirsty land.

verses.verse: O LORD, make haste to answer me; my spirit fails me; *
verses.halfverse: do not hide your face from me or I shall be like those who go down to the Pit.

verses.verse: Let me hear of your loving-kindness in the morning, for I put my trust in you; *
verses.halfverse: show me the road that I must walk, for I lift up my soul to you.

verses.verse: Deliver me from my enemies, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: for I flee to you for refuge.

verses.verse: Teach me to do what pleases you, for you are my God; *
verses.halfverse: let your good Spirit lead me on level ground.

verses.verse: Revive me, O LORD, for your Name's sake; *
verses.halfverse: for your righteousness' sake, bring me out of trouble.

verses.verse: Of your goodness, destroy my enemies and bring all my foes to naught, *
verses.halfverse: for truly I am your servant.

verses.verse: Blessed be the LORD my rock! *
verses.halfverse: who trains my hands to fight and my fingers to battle;

verses.verse: My help and my fortress, my stronghold and my deliverer, *
verses.halfverse: my shield in whom I trust, who subdues the peoples under me.

verses.verse: O LORD, what are we that you should care for us? *
verses.halfverse: mere mortals that you should think of us?

verses.verse: We are like a puff of wind; *
verses.halfverse: our days are like a passing shadow.

verses.verse: Bow your heavens, O LORD, and come down; *
verses.halfverse: touch the mountains, and they shall smoke.

verses.verse: Hurl the lightning and scatter them; *
verses.halfverse: shoot out your arrows and rout them.

verses.verse: Stretch out your hand from on high; *
verses.halfverse: rescue me and deliver me from the great waters, from the hand of foreign peoples,

verses.verse: Whose mouths speak deceitfully *
verses.halfverse: and whose right hand is raised in falsehood.

verses.verse: O God, I will sing to you a new song; *
verses.halfverse: I will play to you on a ten-stringed lyre.

verses.verse: You give victory to kings *
verses.halfverse: and have rescued David your servant.

verses.verse: Rescue me from the hurtful sword *
verses.halfverse: and deliver me from the hand of foreign peoples,

verses.verse: Whose mouths speak deceitfully *
verses.halfverse: and whose right hand is raised in falsehood.

verses.verse: May our sons be like plants well nurtured from their youth, *
verses.halfverse: and our daughters like sculptured corners of a palace.

verses.verse: May our barns be filled to overflowing with all manner of crops; *
verses.halfverse: may the flocks in our pastures increase by thousands and tens of thousands; may our cattle be fat and sleek.

verses.verse: May there be no breaching of the walls, no going into exile, *
verses.halfverse: no wailing in the public squares.

verses.verse: Happy are the people of whom this is so! *
verses.halfverse: happy are the people whose God is the LORD!

verses.verse: I will exalt you, O God my King, *
verses.halfverse: and bless your Name for ever and ever.

verses.verse: Every day will I bless you *
verses.halfverse: and praise your Name for ever and ever.

verses.verse: Great is the LORD and greatly to be praised; *
verses.halfverse: there is no end to his greatness.

verses.verse: One generation shall praise your works to another *
verses.halfverse: and shall declare your power.

verses.verse: I will ponder the glorious splendor of your majesty *
verses.halfverse: and all your marvelous works.

verses.verse: They shall speak of the might of your wondrous acts, *
verses.halfverse: and I will tell of your greatness.

verses.verse: They shall publish the remembrance of your great goodness; *
verses.halfverse: they shall sing of your righteous deeds.

verses.verse: The LORD is gracious and full of compassion, *
verses.halfverse: slow to anger and of great kindness.

verses.verse: The LORD is loving to everyone *
verses.halfverse: and his compassion is over all his works.

verses.verse: All your works praise you, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and your faithful servants bless you.

verses.verse: They make known the glory of your kingdom *
verses.halfverse: and speak of your power;

verses.verse: That the peoples may know of your power *
verses.halfverse: and the glorious splendor of your kingdom.

verses.verse: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom; *
verses.halfverse: your dominion endures throughout all ages.

verses.verse: The LORD is faithful in all his words *
verses.halfverse: and merciful in all his deeds.

verses.verse: The LORD upholds all those who fall; *
verses.halfverse: he lifts up those who are bowed down.

verses.verse: The eyes of all wait upon you, O LORD, *
verses.halfverse: and you give them their food in due season.

verses.verse: You open wide your hand *
verses.halfverse: and satisfy the needs of every living creature.

verses.verse: The LORD is righteous in all his ways *
verses.halfverse: and loving in all his works.

verses.verse: The LORD is near to those who call upon him, *
verses.halfverse: to all who call upon him faithfully.

verses.verse: He fulfills the desire of those who fear him; *
verses.halfverse: he hears their cry and helps them.

verses.verse: The LORD preserves all those who love him, *
verses.halfverse: but he destroys all the wicked.

verses.verse: My mouth shall speak the praise of the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: let all flesh bless his holy Name for ever and ever.

verses.verse: Hallelujah! Praise the LORD, O my soul! *
verses.halfverse: I will praise the LORD as long as I live; I will sing praises to my God while I have my being.

verses.verse: Put not your trust in rulers, nor in any child of earth, *
verses.halfverse: for there is no help in them.

verses.verse: When they breathe their last, they return to earth, *
verses.halfverse: and in that day their thoughts perish.

verses.verse: Happy are they who have the God of Jacob for their help! *
verses.halfverse: whose hope is in the LORD their God;

verses.verse: Who made heaven and earth, the seas, and all that is in them; *
verses.halfverse: who keeps his promise for ever;

verses.verse: Who gives justice to those who are oppressed, *
verses.halfverse: and food to those who hunger.

verses.verse: The LORD sets the prisoners free; the LORD opens the eyes of the blind; *
verses.halfverse: the LORD lifts up those who are bowed down;

verses.verse: The LORD loves the righteous; the LORD cares for the stranger; *
verses.halfverse: he sustains the orphan and widow, but frustrates the way of the wicked.

verses.verse: The LORD shall reign for ever, *
verses.halfverse: your God, O Zion, throughout all generations. Hallelujah!

verses.verse: Hallelujah! How good it is to sing praises to our God! *
verses.halfverse: how pleasant it is to honor him with praise!

verses.verse: The LORD rebuilds Jerusalem; *
verses.halfverse: he gathers the exiles of Israel.

verses.verse: He heals the brokenhearted *
verses.halfverse: and binds up their wounds.

verses.verse: He counts the number of the stars *
verses.halfverse: and calls them all by their names.

verses.verse: Great is our LORD and mighty in power; *
verses.halfverse: there is no limit to his wisdom.

verses.verse: The LORD lifts up the lowly, *
verses.halfverse: but casts the wicked to the ground.

verses.verse: Sing to the LORD with thanksgiving; *
verses.halfverse: make music to our God upon the harp.

verses.verse: He covers the heavens with clouds *
verses.halfverse: and prepares rain for the earth;

verses.verse: He makes grass to grow upon the mountains *
verses.halfverse: and green plants to serve mankind.

verses.verse: He provides food for flocks and herds *
verses.halfverse: and for the young ravens when they cry.

verses.verse: He is not impressed by the might of a horse; *
verses.halfverse: he has no pleasure in the strength of a man;

verses.verse: But the LORD has pleasure in those who fear him, *
verses.halfverse: in those who await his gracious favor.

verses.verse: Worship the LORD, O Jerusalem; *
verses.halfverse: praise your God, O Zion;

verses.verse: For he has strengthened the bars of your gates; *
verses.halfverse: he has blessed your children within you.

verses.verse: He has established peace on your borders; *
verses.halfverse: he satisfies you with the finest wheat.

verses.verse: He sends out his command to the earth, *
verses.halfverse: and his word runs very swiftly.

verses.verse: He gives snow like wool; *
verses.halfverse: he scatters hoarfrost like ashes.

verses.verse: He scatters his hail like bread crumbs; *
verses.halfverse: who can stand against his cold?

verses.verse: He sends forth his word and melts them; *
verses.halfverse: he blows with his wind, and the waters flow.

verses.verse: He declares his word to Jacob, *
verses.halfverse: his statutes and his judgments to Israel.

verses.verse: He has not done so to any other nation; *
verses.halfverse: to them he has not revealed his judgments. Hallelujah!

verses.verse: Hallelujah! Praise the LORD from the heavens; *
verses.halfverse: praise him in the heights.

verses.verse: Praise him, all you angels of his; *
verses.halfverse: praise him, all his host.

verses.verse: Praise him, sun and moon; *
verses.halfverse: praise him, all you shining stars.

verses.verse: Praise him, heaven of heavens, *
verses.halfverse: and you waters above the heavens.

verses.verse: Let them praise the Name of the LORD; *
verses.halfverse: for he commanded, and they were created.

verses.verse: He made them stand fast for ever and ever; *
verses.halfverse: he gave them a law which shall not pass away.

verses.verse: Praise the LORD from the earth, *
verses.halfverse: you sea-monsters and all deeps;

verses.verse: Fire and hail, snow and fog, *
verses.halfverse: tempestuous wind, doing his will;

verses.verse: Mountains and all hills, *
verses.halfverse: fruit trees and all cedars;

verses.verse: Wild beasts and all cattle, *
verses.halfverse: creeping things and wingèd birds;

verses.verse: Kings of the earth and all peoples, *
verses.halfverse: princes and all rulers of the world;

verses.verse: Young men and maidens, *
verses.halfverse: old and young together.

verses.verse: Let them praise the Name of the LORD, *
verses.halfverse: for his Name only is exalted, his splendor is over earth and heaven.

verses.verse: He has raised up strength for his people and praise for all his loyal servants, *
verses.halfverse: the children of Israel, a people who are near him. Hallelujah!

verses.verse: Hallelujah! Sing to the LORD a new song; *
verses.halfverse: sing his praise in the congregation of the faithful.

verses.verse: Let Israel rejoice in his Maker; *
verses.halfverse: let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.

verses.verse: Let them praise his Name in the dance; *
verses.halfverse: let them sing praise to him with timbrel and harp.

verses.verse: For the LORD takes pleasure in his people *
verses.halfverse: and adorns the poor with victory.

verses.verse: Let the faithful rejoice in triumph; *
verses.halfverse: let them be joyful on their beds.

verses.verse: Let the praises of God be in their throat *
verses.halfverse: and a two-edged sword in their hand;

verses.verse: To wreak vengeance on the nations *
verses.halfverse: and punishment on the peoples;

verses.verse: To bind their kings in chains *
verses.halfverse: and their nobles with links of iron;

verses.verse: To inflict on them the judgment decreed; *
verses.halfverse: this is glory for all his faithful people. Hallelujah!

verses.verse: Hallelujah! Praise God in his holy temple; *
verses.halfverse: praise him in the firmament of his power.

verses.verse: Praise him for his mighty acts; *
verses.halfverse: praise him for his excellent greatness.

verses.verse: Praise him with the blast of the ram's-horn; *
verses.halfverse: praise him with lyre and harp.

verses.verse: Praise him with timbrel and dance; *
verses.halfverse: praise him with strings and pipe.

verses.verse: Praise him with resounding cymbals; *
verses.halfverse: praise him with loud-clanging cymbals.

verses.verse: Let everything that has breath *
verses.halfverse: praise the Lord. Hallelujah!
